TL;DR: 论文发现现有AIGC检测器在视频帧上性能骤降，提出将视频帧作为自然增强数据、结合跨模态对比学习的VINA框架，在图像和视频检测上均取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SOTA的AI生成图像检测器在应用于视频帧时性能崩溃，这一跨模态差距源于视频处理带来的分布偏移（如色彩转换、压缩、缩放、模糊）以及视频生成器的模型指纹。

Method: 提出VINA框架：1) 将视频帧作为物理真实的自然增强数据；2) 引入跨模态监督对比学习，对齐图像和视频在真/假决策边界上的表征。

Result: 在14个图像、视频及真实场景基准上，VINA在几乎所有设置下取得SOTA性能，实现了双向增益，鲁棒性和迁移性均有提升。

Conclusion: VINA无需复杂增强或数据集特定调参即可泛化跨模态检测，验证了视频帧作为自然增强的有效性。

Abstract: AI-generated content (AIGC) is rapidly improving, creating an urgent need for detectors that generalize across data sources, deployment pipelines, and visual modalities. A strongly generalizable detector should remain robust under distributional variations. However, we identify a consistent failure mode: SOTA AI-generated image detectors often collapse when applied to frames extracted from videos. Through systematic analysis, we show that this cross-modal gap arises from both entangled synthesis-agnostic video processing shifts, including color conversion, codec compression, resizing, and blur, and model-specific fingerprints introduced by modern video generators. Motivated by these findings, we propose VINA (Video as Natural Augmentation), a unified AIGC detection framework that jointly trains on image and video data. VINA uses video frames as physically grounded natural augmentations and further introduces a cross-modal supervised contrastive objective to align image and video representations under a shared real/fake decision boundary. Extensive experiments on 14 image, video, and in-the-wild benchmarks show that VINA delivers bidirectional gains, improves robustness and transferability, and achieves state-of-the-art performance across nearly all evaluated settings without complex augmentation or dataset-specific tuning.

</details>


### [38] [Interpreting and Enhancing Emotional Circuits in Large Vision-Language Models via Cross-Modal Information Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21980)
*Chengsheng Zhang,Chenghao Sun,Zhining Xie,Xinmei Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于steering-vector的因果归因框架，揭示LVLM中“Adapt-Aggregate-Execute”三阶段情感电路机制，发现视觉情感线索在中层通过情感特异性注意力头聚合，在深层通过情感通用路径转化为叙事生成，并通过推理时干预有效提升情感理解性能、缓解情感幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LVLM在情感理解方面表现出色，但其如何将抽象视觉刺激转化为连贯情感叙述的内部机制尚不明确，主要受限于视觉反事实样本的缺乏和情感表达的弥散性。

Method: 提出基于steering-vector的因果归因框架；构建专用数据集；发现“Adapt-Aggregate-Execute”三阶段机制——中层情感特异性注意力头聚合视觉情感线索，深层情感通用路径转化为叙事生成；通过调节情感信息路由和放大语义激活进行推理时干预。

Result: 在MER-UniBench上显著提升性能，有效缓解情感幻觉，验证了所发现电路的因果保真度。

Conclusion: 揭示了LVLM中情感推理的功能解耦机制，并通过推理时干预方法验证了其因果有效性，为理解和调控LVLM的情感处理提供了新视角。

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) represent a significant leap towards empathetic agents, demonstrating remarkable capabilities in emotion understanding. However, the internal mechanisms governing how LVLMs translate abstract visual stimuli into coherent emotional narratives remain largely unexplored, primarily due to the scarcity of visual counterfactuals and the diffuse nature of emotional expression. In this paper, we bridge this gap by introducing a steering-vector-based causal attribution framework tailored for descriptive emotional reasoning. To this end, we construct a specialized dataset to demystify the emotional circuits underlying the three-stage ``Adapt-Aggregate-Execute'' mechanism. Crucially, we discover a functional decoupling: visual emotional cues are aggregated in middle layers via sentiment-specific attention heads, but are subsequently translated into narrative generation in deep layers through emotion-general pathways. Guided by these insights, we regulate the emotional information routing to strengthen attention flow and amplify the semantic activation to consolidate expression. Extensive experiments on the comprehensive MER-UniBench demonstrate that our methods significantly improve performance via inference-time intervention, effectively mitigating emotional hallucinations and corroborating the causal fidelity of the discovered circuits.

</details>


### [39] [RiT: Vanilla Diffusion Transformers Suffice in Representation Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21981)
*Le Zhang,Ning Mang,Aishwarya Agrawal*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出 Representation Image Transformer (RiT)，通过在冻结的 DINOv2 特征空间上进行 x-prediction 流匹配训练，发现相比像素空间，DINOv2 特征空间具有更好的统计特性（更高有效秩、更好协方差条件、更低峰度等），使得流匹配回归条件良好，无需特殊预测头或黎曼传输。RiT 在 ImageNet 256×256 上以更少参数达到 FID 1.45（无引导）和 1.14（有引导），且粗离散化下高效可解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究预训练表示空间（如 DINOv2）相比像素空间，是否在流匹配学习中提供更有利的分布特性，从而提升生成模型性能。

Method: 在像素、SD-VAE、DINOv2 三种特征空间上，从内在维度、有效秩、协方差条件、超额峰度、流形上插值误差四个几何维度进行统计比较；提出 RiT，在冻结 DINOv2 特征上用 x-prediction 训练 vanilla Diffusion Transformer，加上维度感知噪声调度和 [CLS]-patch 联合建模。

Result: DINOv2 相比像素空间：有效秩高 7.3 倍、协方差条件好 35 倍、超额峰度低 11.5 倍、流形上插值误差低 1.7 倍。RiT 在 ImageNet 256×256 上 FID 1.45（无引导）/1.14（有引导），参数比 DiT^DH-XL 少 19%，5 步 Heun 即可达 FID 2.0。

Conclusion: 预训练表示空间的统计特性优势使得流匹配回归良态，可简化模型设计并实现高效粗离散化采样，无需蒸馏或一致性训练。

Abstract: Flow matching with $x$-prediction -- regressing the clean data point rather than the ambient velocity -- is known to exploit low-dimensional manifold structure effectively in pixel space \cite{li2025back}. We ask whether a pretrained representation space, while containing a low-dimensional data manifold of comparable intrinsic dimensionality, offers a distribution more favorable for flow-matching learning. Comparing pixel, SD-VAE, and DINOv2 features along four geometric axes, we find that pixel and DINOv2 share nearly identical intrinsic dimensionalities (both $\hat{d}\!\approx\!33$) yet DINOv2 exhibits $7.3\times$ higher effective rank, $35\times$ better covariance conditioning, $11.5\times$ lower excess kurtosis, and $1.7\times$ lower on-manifold interpolation error; SD-VAE latents are consistently intermediate, indicating that the advantage stems from representation-learning objectives rather than mere compression. These statistical properties render the flow-matching regression well-conditioned and remove the need for the specialized prediction heads or Riemannian transport used by prior DINOv2 diffusion methods. We propose the \emph{Representation Image Transformer} (RiT): a vanilla Diffusion Transformer trained by $x$-prediction on frozen DINOv2 features, augmented only by a dimension-aware noise schedule and joint \texttt{[CLS]}-patch modeling. On ImageNet $256{\times}256$, RiT attains FID 1.45 without guidance and 1.14 with classifier-free guidance, outperforming DiT$^\text{DH}$-XL with $19\%$ fewer parameters (676M vs.\ 839M). The resulting ODE is efficiently solvable at coarse discretizations: with classifier-free guidance, $5$ Heun steps already reach FID 2.0 and $10$ steps reach 1.25, without distillation or consistency training. Code at https://github.com/lezhang7/RiT.

</details>


### [40] [Learning Spatiotemporal Sensitivity in Video LLMs via Counterfactual Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21988)
*Dazhao Du,Jian Liu,Jialong Qin,Tao Han,Bohai Gu,Fangqi Zhu,Yujia Zhang,Eric Liu,Xi Chen,Song Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Counterfactual Relational Policy Optimization (CRPO)，通过构建反事实视频（水平翻转、时间反转）并引入反事实关系奖励（CRR），在RL训练中鼓励模型对动态问题改变答案、对静态问题保持答案，从而提升视频大语言模型的时空敏感性，避免捷径学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频LLM在基准测试中表现良好，但常通过单帧线索、语言先验等捷径来回答问题，而非真正追踪视频的时空动态。RL后训练中仅以正确性为奖励进一步强化了这种捷径策略，导致模型缺乏真正的时空理解能力。

Method: 提出CRPO框架，包含双分支RL：1）构造反事实视频（水平翻转和时间反转）作为对照分支；2）引入反事实关系奖励（CRR），根据问题类型（动态/静态）约束原始和反事实分支的答案关系（改变或不变）；3）同时提出DyBench基准（3014个视频），通过配对反事实视频和成对准确率指标来严格评估时空敏感性。

Result: 实验表明，CRPO在时空敏感性评估上优于先前RL方法，同时保持通用视频性能。在Qwen3-VL-8B上，DyBench P-Acc提升+7.7，TimeBlind I-Acc提升+8.2，说明模型真正提升了时空敏感性而非依赖静态捷径。

Conclusion: 通过反事实对比和跨分支约束奖励，CRPO有效抑制了视频LLM的捷径学习，显著提升了时空动态理解能力，且不会牺牲通用性能。

Abstract: Video large language models (Video LLMs) achieve strong benchmark accuracy, yet often answer video questions through shortcuts such as single-frame cues and language priors rather than by tracking spatiotemporal dynamics. This issue is exacerbated in RL post-training, where correctness-only rewards can further reinforce shortcut policies that obtain high reward without tracking video dynamics. We address this by asking a controlled counterfactual question: if the visual world changed while the question remained fixed, should the answer change or stay the same? Based on this view, we propose \textbf{Counterfactual Relational Policy Optimization (CRPO)}, a dual-branch RL framework for improving \emph{spatiotemporal sensitivity}. CRPO constructs counterfactual videos through horizontal flips and temporal reversals, trains on both original and counterfactual branches, and introduces a \textbf{Counterfactual Relation Reward (CRR)} between their answers. CRR encourages answers to change for dynamic questions and remain unchanged for static questions. This cross-branch constraint makes it difficult for shortcut policies to be consistently rewarded across both branches. To evaluate this property, we introduce \textbf{DyBench}, a paired counterfactual video benchmark with 3,014 videos covering reversible dynamics, moving direction, and event sequence, together with a strict pair-accuracy metric that prevents fixed-answer shortcuts from inflating scores. Experiments show that CRPO outperforms prior RL methods on spatiotemporal-sensitive evaluations while maintaining competitive general video performance. On Qwen3-VL-8B, CRPO improves DyBench P-Acc by +7.7 and TimeBlind I-Acc by +8.2 over the base model, indicating improved spatiotemporal sensitivity rather than stronger reliance on static shortcuts. The project website can be found at https://ddz16.github.io/crpo.github.io/ .

</details>


### [41] [Virtual 3D H&E Staining from Phase-contrast Back-illumination Interference Tomography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22000)
*Anthony Song,Boyan Zhou,Mayank Golhar,Marisa Morakis,Alex Baras,Nicholas Durr*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了HistoBIT3D数据集和基于双向多尺度内容一致性与跨域风格复用的虚拟染色框架，实现BIT相位显微镜体积到H&E体积的无监督转换，在零样本Cellpose评估下取得最优的3D细胞核分割精度和边界保持效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: BIT技术能对未处理组织进行快速、非破坏性三维成像，但将其体积数据转化为临床可解释的H&E图像面临挑战，特别是移位对比度变化以及缺乏定量验证基准。

Method: 构建首个体素级配对的BIT与荧光标记细胞核数据集；提出虚拟染色框架，通过双向多尺度内容一致性和跨域风格复用，将移位对比度的BIT体积转化为逼真的H&E体积。

Result: 在真实感指标上达到最优；在零样本Cellpose评估下，3D细胞核分割精度和边界保持显著提升。

Conclusion: 建立了定量验证、结构保真、可扩展的3D虚拟H&E染色流程，推进了无切片的体积计算组织病理学范式。

Abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) histopathology of unprocessed tissues has the potential to transform disease management by enabling volumetric characterization of tissue microarchitecture and in-vivo assessment. Back-illumination Interference Tomography (BIT) is a new phase microscopy technology that provides rapid, non-destructive volumetric imaging of unprocessed tissues. However, translating BIT volumes into clinically interpretable H&E images remains challenging, particularly due to shift-variant contrast and the absence of quantitative validation benchmarks. We introduce HistoBIT3D, the first voxel-wise paired BIT and fluorescence-labeled nuclei dataset, enabling quantitative evaluation of structural preservation in unsupervised virtual staining against ground-truth nuclear distributions. Using this dataset, we present a novel virtual staining framework that translates BIT volumes with shift-variant contrast into realistic H&E volumes by leveraging bidirectional multiscale content consistency and cross-domain style reuse to enhance structural fidelity and perceptual realism. Our method achieves state-of-the-art realism metrics while significantly improving 3D nuclei segmentation accuracy and boundary preservation under zero-shot Cellpose evaluation. Together, these contributions establish a quantitatively validated, structurally faithful, and scalable pipeline for 3D virtual H&E staining, advancing the paradigm of slide-free, volumetric computational histopathology. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/aasong113/HistoBIT3D_VirtualStaining.

</details>


### [42] [ConvNeXt-FD: A Fractal-Based Deep Model for Robust Biomedical Image Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22002)
*Joao Batista Florindo,Amanda Pontes de Oliveira Ornelas*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出ConvNeXt-FD，一种基于ConvNeXt骨干网络和U-Net编解码架构的医学图像分割方法，通过结合Dice系数与可微分形维数边界感知正则化的混合损失函数，在六个生物医学数据集上实现了优于现有方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物医学图像分割面临模态多样、噪声多、形态复杂等挑战，现有方法在捕捉边界细节和形状保真度方面仍存在不足，需要更鲁棒的分割架构。

Method: 采用U-Net风格的编码器-解码器框架，以ConvNeXt作为骨干编码器；提出混合损失函数，结合Dice系数和基于可微分形分维数的边界感知正则化项，增强模型对边界的敏感性。

Result: 在BUSI、DDTI、FluoCells、IDRiD、ISIC2018、MoNuSeg六个数据集上，使用ImageNet预训练权重时，在Dice、Jaccard、Accuracy、Sensitivity、Specificity、FPR等指标上达到竞争性或优越性能。

Conclusion: ConvNeXt作为强编码器结合边界感知正则化，能有效捕捉高层语义特征和细粒度边界细节，在复杂生物医学场景中实现更准确可靠的分割。

Abstract: Biomedical image segmentation is a critical task in medical diagnosis and treatment planning, enabling precise delineation of anatomical structures and pathological regions. Despite significant advancements, challenges persist due to the inherent variability, noise, and complex morphology present in diverse medical imaging modalities. This paper introduces ConvNeXt-FD, a novel deep learning architecture for robust biomedical image segmentation, built upon a U-Net-like encoder-decoder framework leveraging the powerful ConvNeXt backbone. Our approach integrates a hybrid loss function combining the Dice coefficient with a boundary-aware regularization term inspired by a differentiable formulation of Fractal Dimension, designed to enhance the model's sensitivity to object boundaries and shape fidelity. We rigorously evaluate ConvNeXt-FD across six distinct biomedical datasets: BUSI (Breast Ultrasound Images), DDTI (Thyroid Ultrasound Images), FluoCells (Fluorescent Cell Images), IDRiD (Diabetic Retinopathy Images for Optic Disc Segmentation), ISIC2018 (Skin Lesion Images), and MoNuSeg (Nuclei Segmentation). Experimental results demonstrate that ConvNeXt-FD, particularly when initialized with ImageNet pre-trained weights, achieves competitive and often superior performance compared to existing state-of-the-art methods across various metrics, including Dice, Jaccard, Accuracy, Sensitivity, Specificity, and False Positive Rate. The integration of ConvNeXt as a strong encoder, coupled with the boundary-aware regularization, proves effective in capturing both high-level semantic features and fine-grained boundary details, leading to more accurate and reliable segmentations in challenging biomedical contexts.

</details>


### [43] [Rethinking Token Reduction for Diffusion Models via Output-Similarity-Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22011)
*Hangyeol Lee,Hyojeong Lee,Joo-Young Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DiTo提出了一种面向输出的令牌缩减新范式，通过利用相邻时间步间输出令牌相似性的一致性，结合PMR引导的间隔调度和频率感知令牌匹配，在保持效率的同时显著提升了图像生成质量（PSNR提升1.6-3.9 dB）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有令牌缩减方法依赖于从纯缩减ViT范式继承的输入令牌相似性，忽视了生成模型的核心目标——最小化恢复误差，这需要反映输出令牌的相似性，导致方法与目标之间存在根本性错配。

Method: 1) 利用相邻时间步间输出令牌相似性一致性，用前一阶相似性作为代理建立令牌对应关系；2) 提出PMR引导的间隔调度以优化匹配频率；3) 引入频率感知令牌匹配，通过选择频率惩罚缓解反复复用导致的局部近似误差和块效应。

Result: 在可比加速比下，DiTo持续超越现有TR方法，PSNR提升1.6-3.9 dB，实现了更优的Pareto前沿。

Conclusion: 面向输出的令牌缩减范式能更有效地对齐生成模型的最小化恢复误差目标，DiTo通过输出相似性驱动的策略在效率与质量之间取得了更好的平衡。

Abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) achieve superior image generation quality but suffer from quadratic computational complexity relative to token count. While various token reduction (TR) methods have been proposed to mitigate this cost, they overlook the primary objective of generative models: minimizing recovery error, which requires reflecting output token similarity. They rely solely on input token similarity inherited from reduction-only ViT paradigms, leading to a fundamental misalignment with this objective.
  To bridge this gap, we propose DiTo, a novel TR paradigm that shifts the focus toward output-centric token reduction. Based on the observation that output token similarity is consistently preserved across adjacent timesteps, DiTo utilizes prior-step similarities as an effective proxy to establish token correspondences at a Matching timestep, which are then reused across multiple subsequent Reduction timesteps. To optimize this interleaved scheduling, we propose Pair Match Ratio (PMR)-guided Interval Scheduling to determine the optimal matching frequency. Furthermore, to mitigate localized approximation errors and resulting blocking artifacts caused by repeated reuse, we propose Frequency-aware Token Matching by incorporating a selection-frequency penalty. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiTo consistently outperforms existing TR methods with 1.6-3.9 dB higher PSNR at comparable speedups, achieving a superior Pareto frontier.

</details>


### [44] [PointLLM-R: Enhancing 3D Point Cloud Reasoning via Chain-of-Thought](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22013)
*Chaoqi Chen,Qile Xu,Wenjun Zhou,Hui Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出数据为中心的框架构建大规模3D点云CoT推理数据集PoCoTI，并基于此微调得到具备推理能力的3D多模态模型PointLLM-R，在生成式分类和描述任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D多模态模型缺乏显式推理能力，而CoT在LLM和图像MLLM中已展现有效性，但尚未扩展到3D点云理解领域。

Method: 提出两阶段数据构建框架：1) 基于VLM的质量评估和参考引导的精炼来优化点云-文本指令数据；2) 通过人类参与的提示优化(HiLPO)合成高质量推理路径。最终构建55K样本的PoCoTI数据集，并微调PointLLM得到PointLLM-R。

Result: PointLLM-R在生成式3D分类和描述任务上达到SOTA，并鲁棒泛化到真实扫描点云和多轮对话场景。

Conclusion: 数据驱动的CoT推理路径构建能有效提升3D多模态模型的推理能力和泛化性能，填补了CoT在3D理解领域的空白。

Abstract: Understanding 3D point clouds through language remains a fundamental challenge in computer graphics and visual computing, due to the irregular structure of point cloud data and the lack of explicit reasoning in existing 3D multimodal models. While Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has shown strong effectiveness in LLMs and image-based MLLMs, its extension to 3D understanding remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we propose a data-centric framework for constructing large-scale CoT supervision tailored to 3D point cloud understanding. Our framework consists of a two-stage pipeline that first refines point-text instruction data via vision-language-model-based quality evaluation and reference-guided refinement, and then synthesizes high-quality reasoning paths through Human-in-the-Loop Prompt Optimization (HiLPO). Using this approach, we build PoCoTI, a CoT-enhanced point-text instruction-following dataset containing 55K samples with explicit reasoning paths. Fine-tuning PointLLM on PoCoTI yields PointLLM-R, a reasoning-capable 3D multimodal language model. Extensive experiments on generative 3D classification and captioning demonstrate that PointLLM-R achieves state-of-the-art performance and generalizes robustly to real-world scanned point clouds and multi-turn dialogue scenarios.

</details>


### [45] [ORBIS: Output-Guided Token Reduction with Distribution-Aware Matching for Video Diffusion Acceleration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22015)
*Hangyeol Lee,Joo-Young Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ORBIS提出了一种软硬件协同设计的视频DiT加速器，通过利用前一时间步的输出激活提高token间相似度估计的准确性，并设计分布感知的token匹配算法(DATM)及专用流水线硬件，相比SOTA方法AsymRnR实现约2倍token缩减率提升，最高4.5倍加速和79.3%能耗降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频DiT中3D时空注意力导致token长度随帧数线性增长，计算成本剧增。现有token缩减方法依赖不准确的相似度估计和轻量匹配算法，匹配质量差，加速效果有限。

Method: 1) 利用前一时间步的输出激活获取更准确的token间相似度，提升匹配质量和缩减率；2) 提出分布感知的token匹配算法(DATM)，捕捉全局token分布并显式最小化token对损失；3) 设计深度流水线专用硬件，通过量化压缩硬件开销，仅占总面积2.4%。

Result: 相比AsymRnR达到约2倍token缩减率提升；相比NVIDIA A100 GPU实现最高4.5倍加速和79.3%能耗降低；硬件面积开销仅2.4%，精度损失可忽略。

Conclusion: ORBIS通过软硬件协同设计有效解决了视频DiT中token缩减匹配质量差的问题，在显著加速和降低能耗的同时保持极小硬件开销和精度，为视频生成模型的高效部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Diffusion Transformer (DiT) has emerged as a powerful model architecture for generating high-quality images and videos. In the case of video DiT, 3D Spatio-Temporal Attention increases token length in proportion to the number of frames, sharply increasing computational cost. Token reduction methods mitigate this cost by exploiting spatial redundancy, but existing approaches rely on inaccurate similarity estimates and lightweight matching algorithms, resulting in poor matching quality and only marginal acceleration.
  To overcome these limitations, we propose ORBIS, an SW-HW co-designed accelerator for video DiT. ORBIS leverages the output activation from the previous timestep to obtain more accurate inter-token similarity, substantially improving matching quality and enabling a higher token reduction ratio. We further introduce a Distribution-Aware Token Matching (DATM) algorithm that captures global token distribution and explicitly minimizes token-pair loss for additional gains. To fully hide DATM latency, we design specialized, deeply pipelined hardware and minimize its hardware cost through quantization, occupying only 2.4% of total area with negligible accuracy loss. Extensive experiments show that ORBIS achieves about 2x higher token reduction ratio than the state-of-the-art approach, AsymRnR, while delivering up to 4.5x speedup and 79.3% energy reduction compared to an NVIDIA A100 GPU.

</details>


### [46] [Diverse Yet Consistent: Context-Guided Diffusion with Energy-Based Joint Refinement for Multi-Agent Motion Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22017)
*Lei Chu,Yuhuan Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于扩散模型的多人运动预测框架，通过历史轨迹引导机制和能量函数约束，在保持个体轨迹合理性的同时提升多智能体交互的多样性与联合一致性，在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度生成模型虽能捕捉人体运动的多样化分布，但在多智能体交互场景中难以同时保证预测的多样性和智能体间的一致性；同时，多数方法仅用单智能体指标评估，无法反映联合动态特性。

Method: 1) 基于扩散模型，利用历史轨迹的丰富上下文信息通过引导机制增强预测的多样性与表现力；2) 引入基于能量的公式来精炼联合轨迹分布，同时保持个体轨迹的合理性。

Result: 在四个基准数据集上一致优于现有方法；在ETH/UCY上显著改进了边际指标(ADE/FDE)和联合指标(JADE/JFDE)；相比联合预测方法，在边际指标上有显著提升，同时保持竞争力的联合性能。

Conclusion: 所提框架有效平衡了多智能体运动预测中的多样性与交互一致性，证明了结合历史轨迹引导和能量约束的扩散模型是处理复杂多智能体预测问题的有效途径。

Abstract: Deepgenerative models havebecomeapromisingapproach for human motion prediction due to their ability to capture multimodal distributions and represent diverse human be haviors. However, generating predictions that are both di verse and jointly consistent among interacting agents re mains challenging. In addition, most existing approaches are primarily evaluated using single-agent (marginal) met rics, which fail to fully reflect the joint dynamics of multi agent interactions. We propose a diffusion-based frame work that improves multi-agent motion prediction by lever aging rich contextual information from historical trajecto ries. This information is incorporated through a guidance mechanism to enhance the diversity and expressiveness of predicted motions. To further enforce interaction consis tency, we introduce an energy-based formulation that re fines the joint trajectory distribution while preserving the plausibility of individual trajectories. Extensive experi ments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing methods. No tably, our approach substantially improves both marginal (ADE/FDE) and joint (JADE/JFDE) metrics on ETH/UCY over strong marginal baselines. Compared with prior joint prediction methods, it delivers significant gains in marginal metrics while maintaining competitive joint performance.

</details>


### [47] [FRED: A Multi-Modal Autonomous Driving Dataset for Flooded Road Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22018)
*Connor Malone,Sebastien Demmel,Sebastien Glaser*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文介绍了FRED数据集，这是首个针对道路洪涝场景的多模态自动驾驶数据集，包含相机、LiDAR、IMU/GNSS数据，并提供语义标注以支持水险检测与定位等任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前自动驾驶数据集缺乏针对道路积水/洪水场景的数据，现有方法难以有效检测水险，因此亟需一个专门的多模态数据集来支持相关研究。

Method: 收集了五个地点的洪水期间及水退后数据，使用2.3MP相机、64线LiDAR、IMU+RTK GNSS；提供KITTI格式和RTMaps格式；提供语义标注及干燥条件下的对比数据。

Result: 发布了首个面向道路洪涝场景的多模态自动驾驶数据集，包含多传感器数据、语义标注及定位信息。

Conclusion: FRED数据集填补了自动驾驶领域道路水险检测数据的空白，可支持单传感器及多传感器融合的水险检测、定位与SLAM等任务。

Abstract: The Flooded Road Environments Dataset (FRED) is, to our knowledge, the first multi-modal autonomous driving dataset specifically targeting the collection of data from scenarios involving water hazards on the road. The dataset contains images from a 2.3 MP FLIR Blackfly USB3 camera, 64-beam 360$^\circ$ point clouds from an Ouster OS1-64 LiDAR, and data from an iXblue ATLANS-C IMU corrected by a Geoflex RTK GNSS, from five separate locations captured both during and after flooding events. The data has been released in two formats: a KITTI-style format for easy integration with existing data tools, and the RTMaps format for direct replay of the vehicle's data capture. We provide semantic labels to enable the training and evaluation of both single-sensor and sensor-fusion methods for water hazard detection. Position and velocity, as well as data captured under dry conditions, are provided to enable the development of location-based detection methods that may incorporate maps, and to evaluate other tasks such as localisation and SLAM.

</details>


### [48] [ForeSplat: Optimization-Aware Foresight for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22020)
*Yuke Li,Weihang Liu,Cheng Zhang,Yuefeng Zhang,Jiadi Cui,Zixuan Wang,Junran Ding,Haoyu Wu,Yujiao Shi,Jingyi Yu,Xin Lou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出ForeSplat，一种优化感知的训练框架，使前馈3D高斯泼溅模型生成更适合下游优化的初始化，通过轻量级元梯度（MetaGrad）训练规则，在不增加推理成本的情况下实现快速高质量3D重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前馈3DGS模型受限于3D标注数据稀缺，难以达到每场景优化的质量水平；现有"预测后优化"范式中，前馈模型只针对零步渲染误差训练，忽略了其输出是否构成下游优化器的良好初始化。

Method: 提出MetaGrad（多锚点元梯度训练规则）：展开短内循环优化轨迹，采样多个锚点状态，聚合一阶梯度反向传播到预测头作为优化感知信号，避免高阶微分的高计算成本。

Result: 在AnySplat、Pi3X等多种骨干网络上验证，ForeSplat训练的初始化在更少优化步骤内收敛，达到更高峰值重建质量，且不增加推理成本。

Conclusion: ForeSplat有效弥合了前馈预测与每场景优化之间的差距，为轻量级高保真3D重建提供了实用路径。

Abstract: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) models offer fast single-pass reconstruction,but scaling them to match per-scene optimization quality is fundamentally hindered by the scarcity of large-scale 3D annotations.A practical compromise is predict-then-refine,where post-prediction optimization compensates for the limited capacity of the feed-forward network.However,standard feed-forward 3DGS is trained solely for zero-step rendering error,ignoring whether its output constitutes a good initialization for the downstream optimizer.We present ForeSplat,an optimization-aware training framework that equips feed-forward 3DGS models to produce initializations explicitly designed for rapid,effective refinement.By offloading part of the scene-modeling burden to the optimizer,ForeSplat substantially reduces the capacity pressure on the feed-forward model,making high-quality reconstruction feasible even with compact networks.At its core is MetaGrad,a lightweight multi-anchor meta-gradient training rule that bypasses costly higher-order differentiation through the 3DGS optimizer.MetaGrad unrolls a short inner-loop refinement trajectory,samples anchor states,and back-propagates aggregated first-order gradients to the prediction head as a surrogate optimization-aware signal.This fine-tuning adds no inference cost and enables high-quality reconstruction within seconds after a few refinement steps.We instantiate ForeSplat on diverse backbones,including AnySplat,Pi3X,and a distilled variant tailored for edge deployment.Across all tested architectures,a ForeSplat-trained initialization converges in fewer refinement steps and reaches a higher peak reconstruction quality than its vanilla counterpart,even fully converged.The framework consistently bridges the gap between amortized prediction and per-scene optimization,establishing a practical path toward lightweight,high-fidelity 3D reconstruction.

</details>


### [49] [SO-Mamba: State-Ownership Mamba for Unrolled MRI Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22031)
*Pengcheng Fang,Hongli Chen,Fangfang Tang,Feng Liu,Xiaohao Cai,Shanshan Shan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SO-Mamba，一种状态所有权Mamba正则化器，通过区分循环驻留证据和非驻留证据，改进了MRI重建中的长程建模，在五个基准数据集上优于CNN、Transformer和Mamba基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在展开式MRI重建中，不同阶段处理不同的重建迭代，但现有Mamba方法将持久驻留证据和阶段相关非驻留证据混入同一循环内容路径，导致重建内容不一致。

Method: 提出状态所有权路由(SOR)，将重建证据分为三类：循环驻留载体（进入Mamba内容路径）、状态接口访问（仿射调制B/C状态接口）、非状态输出校正（通过输出出口贡献）。并引入两级外带泄漏诊断，分离隐藏状态存储与读出表达。

Result: 在五个涵盖不同解剖结构、采样模式和线圈配置的公开MRI重建基准上，SO-Mamba一致优于CNN、Transformer和Mamba基线，且计算效率具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 通过显式区分驻留与非驻留证据，SO-Mamba能更有效地进行长程建模，在保持解剖结构连贯性的同时恢复缺失细节，为展开式MRI重建提供了新的正则化思路。

Abstract: Accelerated MRI reconstruction requires recovering missing details while preserving anatomically coherent structures across large spatial regions. State-space models such as Mamba provide efficient long-range modeling, making them attractive learned regularizers for unrolled reconstruction. However, in a data-consistency-coupled unrolled solver, different stages operate on different reconstruction iterates, where the resident carrier should preserve coherent reconstruction content across stages while stage-dependent non-resident evidence is tied to the current update. Treating these roles uniformly can place persistent resident-carrier evidence and update-dependent non-resident evidence into the same recurrent content route. We therefore propose SO-Mamba, a state-ownership Mamba regularizer that assigns reconstruction evidence within each Mamba stage to recurrent residency, state-interface access, and non-state output correction. SO-Mamba implements this ownership rule with a State-Ownership Router (SOR), which constructs a resident carrier for recurrent content and routes non-resident evidence to affine modulation of the B/C state interfaces and an output correction outlet. The resident carrier supplies the Mamba content route, while the non-resident evidence stream adapts the state interfaces and contributes through the output outlet without entering the recurrent content route. We further introduce a two-level outer-band leakage diagnostic that separates hidden-state storage from readout expression by measuring outer-band energy in the selective-scan state trajectory and the post-scan Mamba readout. Experiments on five public MRI reconstruction benchmarks spanning diverse anatomies, sampling patterns, and coil configurations show that SO-Mamba consistently improves over CNN-, Transformer-, and Mamba-based baselines with competitive computational efficiency.

</details>


### [50] [AgroVG: A Large-Scale Multi-Source Benchmark for Agricultural Visual Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22034)
*Haocheng Li,Juepeng Zheng,Zenghao Yang,Kaiqi Du,Guilong Xiao,Gengmeng Pu,Haohuan Fu,Jianxi Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出 AgroVG，一个面向农业场景的视觉定位基准，将任务形式化为广义集合预测（支持单目标、多目标、无目标），涵盖 10,071 个标注对、6 类农业目标、两种定位粒度（框/掩码），并对 26 个模型进行零样本评估，发现最佳多目标 Set-F₁ 仅 0.35，掩码成功率低于 0.17，揭示当前模型在农业视觉定位上的显著不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 农业视觉定位面临目标小、重复、遮挡、形状不规则等挑战，且指令可能指零、一或多个目标。现有基准缺乏对此类场景的系统评估，尤其是缺乏同时测试定位精度、目标完备性和存在感知放弃能力的统一基准。

Method: 构建 AgroVG 多源基准：从 10 个源数据集收集 10,071 对图像-表达标注，覆盖 6 类农业目标（作物/杂草、水果、麦穗、害虫、病害、树冠）。任务形式化为广义集合预测，包含 T1（边界框）和 T2（实例掩码）两种粒度，查询覆盖单目标、多目标、无目标三种场景，并提供专门的集合匹配与掩码覆盖评估协议。

Result: 对 26 个模型（含闭源 MLLM、开源 VLM 和专用定位系统）进行零样本评估，最佳多目标 Set-F₁ 仅 0.35，最佳正查询掩码成功率（IoU@0.75）低于 0.17，表明现有方法在农业场景下性能严重不足。

Conclusion: 农业视觉定位任务远未被解决，当前模型在多目标召回和精细掩码定位上存在显著差距，AgroVG 为未来研究提供了标准化的评估平台。

Abstract: Visual grounding, the task of localizing objects described by natural-language expressions, is a foundational capability for agricultural AI systems, enabling applications such as selective weeding, disease monitoring, and targeted harvesting. Reliable evaluation of agricultural visual grounding remains challenging because agricultural targets are often small, repetitive, occluded, or irregularly shaped, and instructions may refer to one, many, or no objects in an image. Evaluating this capability therefore requires jointly testing localization accuracy, target-set completeness, and existence-aware abstention. To address these challenges, we introduce \textbf{AgroVG}, a multi-source benchmark that formulates agricultural grounding as generalized set prediction: given an image and a referring expression, a model must return all matching target instances or abstain when no target is present. AgroVG contains 10{,}071 annotation-grounded image-query pairs from ten source datasets across six target families: crop/weed, fruit, wheat head, pest, plant disease, and tree canopy. It supports bounding-box grounding (T1) across all six families and instance-mask grounding (T2) on sources with reliable instance-level pixel annotations, with queries covering single-target, multi-target, and target-absent regimes. AgroVG further provides task-specific protocols for box-set matching and query-level mask coverage. Zero-shot evaluation of 26 model configurations spanning closed-source MLLMs, open-source VLMs, and specialized grounding systems reveals persistent gaps: the best multi-target Set-$F_1$ reaches only 0.35, and the best positive-query mask success rate at IoU@0.75 remains below 0.17. Data and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/AgroVG-5172/ .

</details>


### [51] [HyLoVQA: Dynamic Hypernetwork-Generated Low-Rank Adaptation for Continual Visual Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22035)
*Yiran Wang,Chenyi Xiong,Ziyue Qin,Miao Zhang,Kui Xiao,Zhifei Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HyLoVQA提出了一种基于锚点记忆库和超网络生成LoRA适配器的持续视觉问答方法，通过对齐特征空间与参数空间的语义差异，有效解决了跨任务干扰问题，在VQA v2和NExT-QA上取得了最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持续VQA面临非平稳数据流中的遗忘问题，现有方法依赖共享参数更新，导致跨层级任务干扰，难以准确适应当前任务和对象。

Method: 1) 维护一个漂移鲁棒的锚点记忆库，存储视觉对象和文本任务的内容；2) 基于检索锚点，超网络生成轻量LoRA适配器实现动态适应；3) 提出对齐损失，约束特征空间与参数空间的语义一致性。

Result: 在VQA v2和NExT-QA数据集的标准与组合设置下，HyLoVQA均优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 通过解耦任务特定参数与共享参数，HyLoVQA有效缓解了持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，为持续VQA提供了新范式。

Abstract: Continual Visual Question Answering (VQA) requires learning from non-stationary streams of visual inputs and questions while preserving past knowledge. Most prior methods adapt by updating a largely shared parameter set. This often leads to cross-level task interference, hindering accurate adaptation to the current task and object. To address this limitation, we propose HyLoVQA. It maintains a drift-resilient memory bank of anchors. The bank stores the content of visual objects and textual tasks, and they are updated using current input features. Conditioned on retrieved anchors, a hypernetwork generates lightweight Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapters. This ensures parameter efficiency, allowing the model to adapt to each task and object dynamically. Additionally, we formulate an alignment loss that aligns semantic discrepancies in the feature space with functional changes in the parameter space, thereby constraining LoRA adapters to remain focused on the current task and object. Extensive experiments on VQA v2 and NExT-QA under both standard and compositional settings demonstrate the superiority of HyLoVQA over prior state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [52] [GA-VLN: Geometry-Aware BEV Representation for Efficient Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22036)
*Jiahao Yang,Zihan Wang,Xiangyang Li,Xing Zhu,Yujun Shen,Yinghao Xu,Shuqiang Jiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出GA-BEV表示，通过显式深度投影和隐式3D先验构建紧凑的鸟瞰图特征，在无需额外数据增强的情况下实现SOTA视觉语言导航性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLN方法依赖密集RGB视频，产生过多patch token且缺乏显式空间结构，导致计算开销大、空间推理能力受限。

Method: 1) 从RGB-D输入构建BEV空间地图，将视觉特征投影到3D空间并聚合为以智能体为中心的紧凑表示；2) 融合预训练3D基础模型的结构先验特征到BEV空间，形成显式深度+隐式先验的互补几何信息。

Result: 仅使用导航数据（无需DAgger增强或混合VQA训练）即达到SOTA性能，展现出鲁棒性和数据效率。

Conclusion: GA-BEV通过几何感知的紧凑表示有效提升了VLN系统的效率与空间推理能力，验证了显式+隐式几何线索融合的有效性。

Abstract: Despite significant progress in Vision-Language Navigation (VLN), existing approaches still rely on dense RGB videos that produce excessive patch tokens and lack explicit spatial structure, resulting in substantial computational overhead and limited spatial reasoning. To address these issues, we introduce the Geometry-Aware BEV (GA-BEV) - a compact, 3D-grounded feature representation that integrates both explicit and implicit geometric cues into multimodal large language model (MLLM) - based navigation systems. We construct BEV spatial maps from RGB-D inputs by projecting visual features into 3D space and aggregating them into an agent-centric layout that preserves geometric consistency while reducing token redundancy. To further enrich geometric understanding, we incorporate features from a pretrained 3D foundation model into the BEV space, injecting structural priors learned from large-scale 3D reconstruction tasks. Together, these complementary cues - explicit depth-based projection and implicit learned priors - yield compact yet spatially expressive representations that substantially improve navigation efficiency and performance. Experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art results using only navigation data, without DAgger augmentation or mixed VQA training, demonstrating the robustness and data efficiency of the proposed GA-VLN framework.

</details>


### [53] [Physiology and Anatomy Aware Inverse Inference of Myocardial Infarction for Cardiac Digital Twin](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22044)
*Mengxiao Wang,Yilin Lyu,Julia Camps,Ching Hui Sia,Mark Yan-Yee Chan,Yanrui Jin,Shuzhi Sam Ge,Chengliang Liu,Lei Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出基于心脏数字孪生的非侵入性心梗定位框架，通过解剖感知的随机梗死合成策略生成真实不规则疤痕，构建虚拟队列模拟QRS-T波形，并设计PAA-Net联合编码3D心肌几何与多导联ECG，在疤痕和边界区分割上分别达到0.7391和0.5503的Dice分数，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有逆推心梗方法忽视真实疤痕形态和心脏复极化过程，导致对细微ECG变化不敏感且可解释性差，亟需一种能捕捉真实心梗电生理特征的非侵入性定位方法。

Method: 1) 解剖感知随机梗死合成策略生成含边界区的不规则疤痕；2) 构建虚拟队列模拟QRS-T波（同时覆盖去极化和复极化）；3) 设计PAA-Net联合编码3D心肌几何与多导联ECG，推断梗死位置、大小、空间范围和透壁程度。

Result: 疤痕分割Dice 0.7391，边界区分割Dice 0.5503，显著优于现有逆推方法，且提升ECG-梗死关系的可解释性。

Conclusion: 基于数字孪生的框架能有效弥合仿真与真实之间的域差距，实现更准确、可解释的心梗定位。

Abstract: Accurate localization of myocardial infarction is essential for risk stratification. While LGE-MRI remains the gold standard, it is resource-intensive. Integrating cine MRI with ECG enables a more detailed representation of infarct properties. Existing inverse MI inference methods overlook realistic scar morphology and cardiac repolarization, reducing sensitivity to subtle ECG variations and interpretability of infarct-induced electrophysiological changes. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for noninvasive MI localization using cardiac digital twins. To bridge the domain gap between simulation and reality, we introduce an anatomy-aware stochastic infarct synthesis strategy to synthesize realistic, irregular scars with border zones, mimicking ischemic transmural progression. We then construct a virtual cohort to simulate QRS-T waveforms, capturing both depolarization and repolarization dynamics. Furthermore, we design a Physiology and Anatomy Aware Network (PAA-Net) that jointly encodes 3D myocardial geometry and multi-lead ECGs to infer infarct areas with varying localizations, sizes, spatial extents, and transmuralities. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms existing methods in inverse inference, achieving Dice scores of 0.7391 and 0.5503 for scar and border zone segmentation, respectively, while further enhancing the interpretability of the ECG-infarct relationship. Our code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [54] [Broken Memories: Detecting and Mitigating Memorization in Diffusion Models with Degraded Generations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22050)
*Yuanmin Huang,Mi Zhang,Chen Chen,Feifei Li,Geng Hong,Xiaoyu You,Min Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文首次发现扩散模型中的记忆化会导致数值不稳定并产生“破碎”伪影，提出基于潜更新范数的稳定性区域检测方法，并实现自适应缓解记忆化，在Stable Diffusion上达到AUC>0.999的检测性能和0%记忆率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在生成高质量图像时存在记忆训练数据的问题，带来隐私和版权风险，现有方法缺乏对记忆化内在机制的理解和高效的在线检测缓解手段。

Method: 借鉴数值方法中的稳定性分析，引入基于潜更新范数的经验稳定性区域来量化生成过程中的稳定行为，提出逐步骤检测与自适应缓解的在线框架，无需修改提示词或引导条件。

Result: 在Stable Diffusion 1.4上，检测AUC超过0.999，缓解后记忆率为0.0%，额外开销仅为每张图像约0.01秒。

Conclusion: 提出的方法能有效检测并抑制扩散模型中的记忆化，同时保持语义保真度和图像质量，计算开销极低，具有实用价值。

Abstract: While diffusion models excel at generating high-quality images, their tendency to memorize training data poses significant privacy and copyright risks. In this work, we for the first time identify that memorization induces internal numerical instability, often manifesting as visually ``broken'' artifacts. Inspired by stability analysis in numerical methods, we introduce empirical stability regions based on latent update norms to quantitatively characterize stable behavior during generation. Leveraging this, we propose a principled, on-the-fly framework for step-wise detection and adaptive mitigation. Our approach suppresses memorization without altering prompts or guidance, thereby preserving semantic fidelity and image quality. Extensive experiments on Stable Diffusion 1.4 demonstrate that our method achieves an AUC $>0.999$ detection performance and a $0.0\%$ memorization rate after mitigation with negligible overhead ($\approx0.01$s per image).

</details>


### [55] [EasyVFX: Frequency-Driven Decoupling for Resource-Efficient VFX Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22051)
*Yue Ma,Xu Ye,Qinghe Wang,Yucheng Wang,Hongyu Liu,Yinhan Zhang,Xinyu Wang,Yuanpeng Che,Shanhui Mo,Paul Liang,Fangneng Zhan,Qifeng Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EasyVFX提出了一种基于频域分解的资源高效VFX框架，通过频率感知混合专家架构和测试时训练策略，在有限计算资源下实现高质量视觉特效合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统VFX合成需要海量数据和巨大算力，因为空间纹理与时间动态高度耦合。作者希望通过频率域解耦来降低问题复杂度，从而降低计算门槛，让专业级VFX合成更加民主化。

Method: 提出两阶段训练范式：(1) 频率感知混合专家架构（Freq-MoE），通过软路由机制将不同专家分配给不同的频谱带，分别学习外观和运动先验；(2) 测试时训练策略，结合频率约束损失，在单GPU上仅需约100步即可快速适应未见过的特效。

Result: 实验表明EasyVFX能够生成结构一致、视觉惊艳的特效，证明频率感知学习是降低专业级VFX计算门槛的关键催化剂。

Conclusion: 通过频域分解将高维学习问题转化为可管理的子任务，降低了优化难度和数据依赖，实现了资源受限条件下的高质量VFX合成。

Abstract: Generating high-fidelity visual effects (VFX) typically demands massive datasets and prohibitive computational power due to the intricate coupling of spatial textures and temporal dynamics. In this paper, we introduce EasyVFX, a resource-efficient framework that achieves realistic VFX synthesis under stringent constraints. Our core philosophy lies in frequency-domain decomposition: we observe that the complexity of VFX can be significantly mitigated by decoupling high-frequency components, which represent intricate spatial appearances, from low-frequency components that encapsulate global motion dynamics. This spectral disentanglement transforms a high-dimensional learning problem into manageable sub-tasks, thereby lowering the optimization barrier and reducing data dependency. Building upon this insight, we propose a two-stage training paradigm. First, we design a Frequency-aware Mixture-of-Experts (Freq-MoE) architecture. By utilizing a soft routing mechanism, our model assigns specialized experts to distinct spectral bands, enabling them to cultivate robust priors for appearance and motion dynamics. This specialization allows the model to acquire foundational VFX knowledge with fewer GPU resources. Second, we introduce a Test-Time Training strategy powered by a novel Frequency-constraint Loss. This allows the pre-trained model to swiftly adapt to specific, unseen effects through localized optimizations, requiring only about 100 steps on a single GPU. Experimental results demonstrate that EasyVFX produces structurally consistent and visually stunning effects, proving that frequency-aware learning is a key catalyst for democratizing professional-grade VFX.

</details>


### [56] [Distributed Image Compression with Multimodal Side Information at Extremely Low Bitrates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22061)
*Guojun Xu,Mingyang Zhang,Jianwen Xiang,Cheng Tan,Yanchao Yang,Junwei Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MDIC框架，首次在多视角图像压缩中多模态利用侧信息，通过文本到图像的扩散解码器和特征掩码生成器，在极低码率（<0.1 bpp）下实现最先进的感知质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分布式图像压缩方法难以有效利用侧信息中的全局上下文和物体级细节，导致重建图像局部模糊、细节丢失。

Method: 1) 引入文本到图像的扩散解码器，从相关图像中提取文本侧信息以捕获全局语义；2) 设计特征掩码生成器，通过多模态细粒度对齐任务监督，用于引导细节提取和补偿量化嵌入中丢失的类别信息。

Result: 在KITTI Stereo和Cityscapes数据集上，MDIC在极低码率下达到最先进的感知质量。

Conclusion: 多模态方式利用侧信息能有效保留细粒度局部细节并提升全局感知质量，为极低码率分布式图像压缩提供了新范式。

Abstract: Distributed Image Compression (DIC) is crucial for multi-view transmission, especially when operating at extremely low bitrates (< 0.1 bpp). Its core challenge is effectively utilizing side information to achieve high-quality reconstruction under strict bitrate budgets. However, existing DIC approaches struggle to exploit global context and object-level details from side information, leading to local blurring and the loss of fine details in the reconstruction. To address these limitations, we propose a Multimodal DIC framework (MDIC), which, for the first time, leverages side information in a multimodal manner into the DIC paradigm, effectively preserving fine-grained local details and enhancing global perceptual quality in reconstructed images. Specifically, we introduce a text-to-image diffusion-based decoder conditioned on textual side information extracted from correlated images to capture shared global semantics. Moreover, we design a feature-mask generator, supervised by a multimodal fine-grained alignment task, to strengthen the exploitation of visual side information. The generated mask serves two purposes: first, it guides the extraction of fine-grained details from losslessly transmitted side information to preserve the semantic consistency of reconstructed details; second, it regulates the extraction of clustered feature representations from the quantized VQ-VAE embeddings, compensating for category information lost under the extreme compression of the primary image. Extensive experiments on the widely used KITTI Stereo and Cityscapes datasets demonstrate that MDIC achieves state-of-the-art perceptual quality at extremely low bitrates.

</details>


### [57] [Echo4DIR: 4D Implicit Heart Reconstruction from 2D Echocardiography Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22066)
*Yanan Liu,Qinya Li,Hao Zhang,Kangjian He,Xuan Yang,Hao Li,Dan Xu,Lei Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Echo4DIR框架，利用隐式神经表示和统计形状模型，从稀疏2D超声心动图中实现高质量4D心脏几何重建，在临床数据集上达到98.35% Dice和96.75% IoU。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从稀疏2D超声图像重建4D心脏几何结构面临几何模糊性和时间不连续性的根本挑战，现有方法难以兼顾精度与连续性。

Method: 1) 基于统计形状模型(SSM)学习心脏条件SDF作为3D先验；2) 设计极线掩码编码器(Epipolar Mask Encoder)融合多视图特征；3) 提出自监督SDF可微渲染策略，利用未标定临床掩膜实现患者特定形状适应；4) 引入径向SDF对齐(Radial SDF Alignment)策略，通过速度场约束实现物理连续的4D扩展。

Result: 在合成基准和真实临床数据集上达到SOTA性能，临床重叠率达98.35% Dice和96.75% IoU。

Conclusion: Echo4DIR通过隐式表示的连续性和径向SDF对齐策略，有效解决了稀疏观测下的几何模糊和时间漂移问题，实现了高精度4D心脏重建。

Abstract: Reconstructing 4D (3D+t) cardiac geometry from sparse 2D echocardiography is highly desirable yet fundamentally challenged by geometric ambiguity and temporal discontinuity. To tackle these issues, we propose Echo4DIR, a novel test-time 4D implicit reconstruction framework. Specifically, we learn robust 3D shape priors from statistical shape models (SSMs) via a cardiac conditional SDF, constructing an Epipolar Mask Encoder module with epipolar cross attention to effectively fuse multi-view features. To bridge the synthetic-to-real domain gap, we introduce a self-supervised SDF-tailored differentiable rendering strategy for patient-specific 3D shape adaptation using uncalibrated clinical masks without requiring 3D ground truth. Crucially, the inherent continuity of implicit representation overcomes sparse observations, enabling anatomically reliable geometry at arbitrary resolutions. Furthermore, to empower our framework with physically continuous 4D extension, we introduce a Radial SDF Alignment strategy that strictly locks shape evolution to the predicted velocity field, fundamentally eliminating mesh drift. Extensive experiments on synthetic benchmarks and real clinical datasets demonstrate that Echo4DIR achieves state-of-the-art 4D cardiac mesh reconstruction, notably yielding an impressive clinical overlap of up to 98.35% Dice and 96.75% IoU.

</details>


### [58] [COCOTree: A Dataset and Benchmark for Open Tree-Structured Visual Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22068)
*Junhyub Lee,Seunghun Chae,Hyosu Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出并形式化了开放树分解（Open Tree Decomposition）任务，即从图像中分割出具有任意粒度和灵活性的分层树状视觉组件。通过结合LVLMs的语义推理和SAM 3的几何定位，构建了全自动标注生成流程；基于此构建了包含2.1万图像和180万结构节点的COCOTree大规模基准数据集；并提出开放树质量（OTQ）指标来标准化评估协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像分割方法在粒度和灵活性上受限，手动标注分层树状结构成本极高且认知负担重。作者旨在自动化生成细粒度、开放词汇的分层树状分割，以捕捉复杂物理组件的长尾分布。

Method: 1) 提出全自动标注生成流程，融合LVLMs的语义推理能力与SAM 3的精确几何分割能力；2) 构建COCOTree数据集（2.1万+图像，180万节点，3500+开放词汇标签）；3) 提出OTQ评估指标，联合评估掩码精度、标签准确性和结构一致性。

Result: 构建了大规模COCOTree基准（2.1万图像、180万结构节点、3500+开放词汇标签），人工评估验证了自动标注与人类结构判断的高度一致性。

Conclusion: 该工作为开放树分解这一新范式提供了基础基准，包括自动化生成流程、大规模数据集和标准化评估协议，代码与数据已开源。

Abstract: We formalize and enable the task of open tree decomposition, which segments an image into hierarchical trees of visual components with unconstrained granularity and flexibility. Specifically, we provide the foundation benchmark for this new paradigm with the following three key contributions. First, we overcome the prohibitively high cognitive and physical bottlenecks of manual annotation by developing a fully automated generation pipeline that synergizes the semantic reasoning of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) with the precise geometric grounding of SAM 3. Second, leveraging this pipeline, we construct COCOTree, a massive-scale benchmark featuring over 21K images and 1.8M structural nodes. By embracing an open-vocabulary space of over 3.5K unique labels, it successfully captures the long-tail distribution of complex physical assemblies. Notably, rigorous human evaluation confirms our generated annotations demonstrate strong alignment with human structural judgment. Third, we establish a standardized evaluation protocol by proposing the Open Tree Quality (OTQ) metric, which jointly assesses mask precision, label accuracy, and structural consistency. We release our dataset and benchmark code at https://github.com/melonkick3090/COCOTree.

</details>


### [59] [TWINGS: Thin Plate Splines Warp-aligned Initialization for Sparse-View Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22069)
*Hyeseong Kim,Geonhui Son,Deukhee Lee,Dosik Hwang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TWINGS提出了一种基于薄板样条（TPS）非刚性变形模型来对齐反投影点与三角化控制点的方法，为稀疏视角下的3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）提供快速且几何精确的初始化，显著提升场景重建的细节保留和色彩保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏视角输入下的新视角合成面临点云稀疏性的挑战，导致3DGS重建质量下降，因此需要一种能有效处理点稀疏性、提升初始化质量的框架。

Method: 利用薄板样条（TPS）作为平滑非刚性变形模型，通过最小化弯曲能量来估计全局一致的扭曲场，将深度估计得到的反投影点与三角化得到的3D控制点对齐，生成校准后的反投影点；随后在这些控制点附近采样，为3DGS提供快速且几何准确的初始化。

Result: 在DTU、LLFF和Mip-NeRF360数据集上的大量实验表明，TWINGS在稀疏视角场景下持续优于现有方法，能够重建出细节丰富且准确的新视角图像。

Conclusion: TWINGS通过TPS变形校准反投影点，有效解决了3DGS在稀疏视角下的初始化问题，实现了更优的结构细节保持和色彩保真度，为稀疏视图新视角合成提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Novel view synthesis from sparse-view inputs poses a significant challenge in 3D computer vision, particularly for achieving high-quality scene reconstructions with limited viewpoints. We introduce TWINGS, a framework that enhances 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) by directly addressing point sparsity. We employ Thin Plate Splines (TPS), a smooth non-rigid deformation model that minimizes bending energy to estimate a globally coherent warp from control-point correspondences, to align backprojected points from estimated depth with triangulated 3D control points, yielding calibrated backprojected points. By sampling these calibrated points near the control points, TWINGS provides a fast and geometrically accurate initialization for 3DGS, ultimately improving structural detail preservation and color fidelity in reconstructed scenes. Extensive experiments on DTU, LLFF, and Mip-NeRF360 demonstrate that TWINGS consistently outperforms existing methods, delivering detailed and accurate reconstructions under sparse-view scenarios.

</details>


### [60] [JMed48k: A Multi-Profession Japanese Medical Licensing Benchmark for Vision-Language Model Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22080)
*Yue Xun,Junyu Liu,Qian Niu,Xinyi Wang,Zheng Yuan,Zirui Li,Zequn Zhang,Bowen Zhao,Shujun Wang,Irene Li,Kan Hatakeyama-Sato,Yusuke Iwasawa,Yutaka Matsuo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: JMed48k是一个涵盖日本11种国家医疗执照考试的多专业医疗保健基准，包含48,862道考题和20,142张图像。通过评估21个模型并进行图像移除审计，发现通用模型受益于图像，而医学专用模型对视觉证据利用有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医疗视觉-语言模型评估多集中在英语语境，缺乏涵盖多种医疗专业、图像类型丰富的日文医学基准，且对模型如何利用视觉信息的理解不足。

Method: 从日本厚生劳动省官方PDF构建JMed48k（48,862题、20,142张图像，8类视觉注释）。提取JMed48k-Eval子集（近5年12,484题）。引入配对图像移除审计，比较有/无图像时的答题表现，探究四种答案转换状态。

Result: 评估了21个模型。图像移除审计显示，闭源和开源模型从图像中获益显著（净效果跨职业从+5.7到+39.8分不等），而医学专用系统对图像的利用有限，许多正确答案在移除图像后仍保持不变。

Conclusion: JMed48k支持可复现的、按专业分层评估视觉-语言模型在医疗执照考试中的表现，揭示了当前医学专用模型对视觉证据利用不足的问题。

Abstract: We introduce JMed48k, a multi-profession Japanese healthcare licensing benchmark for evaluating vision-language models. Built from official PDF materials released by the Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare, JMed48k contains 48,862 exam questions and 20,142 images from 11 national licensing examinations between 2005 and 2025, with visual content annotated under an 8-type taxonomy. From this corpus, we derive JMed48k-Eval, a recent five-year evaluation subset with 12,484 scored questions, including 9,905 text-only questions and 2,579 questions with images. We evaluate 21 proprietary, open-source, and medical-specific models, reporting text-only and with-image performance separately. Because these subsets contain different questions, we further introduce a paired image-removal audit that evaluates questions with images before and after removing visual content to explore four answer-transition states. The audit shows that proprietary and open source models gain substantially from images, whereas medical-specific systems show limited observable use of visual evidence, with many correct answers persisting after image removal. Even among proprietary models, the net image-removal effect varies sevenfold across professions, from +5.7 points on Physician questions to +39.8 points on Public Health Nurse questions. We release JMed48k to support reproducible, profession-stratified evaluation of vision-language models in medical licensing settings.

</details>


### [61] [GenHAR: Generalizing Cross-domain Human Activity Recognition for Last-mile Delivery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22086)
*Zhiqing Hong,Zelong Li,Xiubin Fan,Guang Yang,Baoshen Guo,Haotian Wang,Tian He,Desheng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出GenHAR框架，通过学习域不变传感器表征解决跨域分布偏移问题，在真实数据集上准确率提升9.97%，计算量降低6.4倍，并在4个城市部署检测了21.5亿条实时活动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类活动识别（HAR）在不同传感器数据域上存在分布偏移问题，导致实际部署时性能下降，现有方法泛化能力不足。

Method: 将传感器数据分词化，学习频率-传感器通道维度的相关性；通过选择性掩码和高效注意力机制提升效率，实现仅用源域数据在目标域泛化。

Result: 准确率比SOTA方法提升9.97%，计算量（FLOPs）降低6.4倍；在4个城市的物流公司部署，检测21.5亿条实时活动。

Conclusion: GenHAR通过域不变表征学习和高效架构设计，有效解决了HAR领域迁移中的分布偏移问题，兼具高性能与低计算开销，具有实际部署价值。

Abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) has shown remarkable effectiveness in various applications, such as smart healthcare and intelligent manufacturing. However, a major challenge faced by HAR is the distribution shift across different sensor data domains, which often leads to decreased performance when deployed for real-world applications. To address this issue, this paper introduces GenHAR, a novel framework designed to mitigate the domain gap by learning domain-invariant sensor representations. GenHAR aims to enhance the generalization capabilities of HAR on target domains purely with data from the source domain. The key novelty of GenHAR lies in two aspects. Firstly, GenHAR tokenizes sensor data and learns correlations among frequency sensor channel dimensions to improve the robustness of HAR models. Secondly, GenHAR improves the efficiency via selective masking and an efficient attention mechanism. We conduct a systematic analysis of GenHAR by comparing it with state-of-the-art HAR methods on real-world human activity datasets. Results show that GenHAR outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 9.97% in accuracy, and reduces Floating Point Operations by 6.4 times. Moreover, we deploy GenHAR at a leading logistics company in 4 cities, and have detected 2.15 billion real-time activities. We release our code at: https://github.com/Sensor-FoundationModel/GenHAR.

</details>


### [62] [LVDrive: Latent Visual Representation Enhanced Vision-Language-Action Autonomous Driving Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22089)
*Xiaodong Mei,Diankun Zhang,Hongwei Xie,Guang Chen,Hangjun Ye,Dan Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LVDrive提出了一种基于潜在视觉表征增强的VLA自动驾驶框架，通过在潜在空间中进行未来场景预测和统一建模，显著提升了闭环驾驶性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖稀疏的动作监督，未能充分利用其场景理解能力；而引入密集视觉监督的世界建模方法过度关注像素级图像重建，忽视了语义级别的场景表征学习。

Method: 1) 在未来潜在空间中引入场景预测任务，利用预训练视觉骨干提供辅助监督；2) 在统一嵌入空间中联合建模未来场景和运动预测，通过单次前向传播实现未来感知推理；3) 设计两阶段轨迹解码策略，利用学习到的潜在未来表征来优化轨迹生成。

Result: 在Bench2Drive基准测试上的大量实验表明，LVDrive在闭环驾驶性能上取得了显著提升，超越了基于动作监督的方法和基于图像重建的世界模型方法。

Conclusion: LVDrive通过潜在空间中的未来感知表征学习，有效弥补了现有VLA模型在场景理解与动作监督之间的鸿沟，为端到端自动驾驶提供了一个更高效、语义更丰富的框架。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising framework for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing VLAs typically rely on sparse action supervision, which underutilizes their powerful scene understanding and reasoning capabilities. Recent attempts to incorporate dense visual supervision via world modeling often overemphasize pixel-level image reconstruction, neglecting semantically meaningful scene representation learning. In this work, we propose LVDrive, a Latent Visual representation enhanced VLA framework for autonomous driving. LVDrive introduces a future scene prediction task into the VLA paradigm, where future representations are learned entirely in a high-level latent space under auxiliary supervision from a pretrained vision backbone. Departing from inefficient autoregressive generation, we jointly model future scene and motion prediction within a unified embedding space, processed in a single forward pass to conduct the future-aware reasoning. We further design a two-stage trajectory decoding strategy that explicitly leverages the learned latent future representations to refine trajectory generation. Extensive experiments on the challenging Bench2Drive benchmark demonstrate that LVDrive achieves significant improvements in closed-loop driving performance, outperforming both action supervised methods and image-reconstruction-based world model approaches.

</details>


### [63] [VISTA: Validation-Guided Integration of Spatial and Temporal Foundation Models with Anatomical Decoding for Rare-Pathology VCE Event Detection -- after competition results](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22096)
*Bo-Cheng Qiu,Fang-Ying Lin,Ming-Han Sun,Yu-Fan Lin,Chia-Ming Lee,Chih-Chung Hsu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VISTA是一个多骨干网络框架，结合EndoFM-LV和DINOv3提取时序与帧级特征，通过DHE、VGWF和ATED模块提升胶囊内镜事件检测性能，在RAREVISION任务中取得第二名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 胶囊内镜事件检测面临临床相关发现稀疏、视觉异质性强且评估指标以事件级别而非帧级别为准的挑战，现有方法难以有效应对。

Method: 提出VISTA框架，包含：(1) EndoFM-LV提取时序上下文，(2) DINOv3 ViTL/16提取帧级视觉语义，(3) Diverse Head Ensemble (DHE)多样头集成，(4) Validation-Guided Weighted Fusion (VGWF)验证引导加权融合，(5) Anatomy-Aware Temporal Event Decoding (ATED)解剖感知时序事件解码。赛后进一步引入局部阈值精调与全局粗搜索。

Result: 官方提交隐藏测试集mAP@0.5为0.3530，mAP@0.95为0.3235。赛后优化后提升至mAP@0.5为0.3726，mAP@0.95为0.3431，位列第二名。

Conclusion: VISTA通过多骨干特征融合与时序事件解码策略有效提升了胶囊内镜事件检测性能，证明了结合时序与视觉语义以及后处理优化的有效性。

Abstract: Capsule endoscopy event detection is challenging because clinically relevant findings are sparse, visually heterogeneous, and evaluated at the event level rather than by frame accuracy. We propose VISTA, a metric-aligned multi-backbone framework for the RAREVISION task. VISTA combines EndoFM-LV for temporal context and DINOv3 ViTL/16 for frame-level visual semantics, followed by a Diverse Head Ensemble (DHE), Validation-Guided Weighted Fusion (VGWF), and Anatomy-Aware Temporal Event Decoding (ATED). The original official submission achieved hidden-test temporal mAP@0.5 of 0.3530 and mAP@0.95 of 0.3235. After the competition, extending local threshold refinement with a global coarse search improved performance to 0.3726 mAP@0.5 and 0.3431 mAP@0.95, ranking Team ACVLab second in the post-competition evaluation.

</details>


### [64] [TextTeacher: What Can Language Teach About Images?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22098)
*Tobias Christian Nauen,Stanislav Frolov,Brian Bernhard Moser,Federico Raue,Ahmed Anwar,Andreas Dengel*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TextTeacher提出一种轻量级辅助目标，通过注入预训练文本嵌入的语义锚点来提升视觉模型训练效率，在ImageNet上最高提升+2.7%准确率，且推理时不增加额外开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于柏拉图表征假说（大模型趋向共享表征几何），探究能否用语言模型的语义知识高效提升视觉模型性能，避免昂贵多模态训练。

Method: 利用现成的图像标题、预训练冻结的文本编码器和轻量投影层生成语义锚点，作为辅助监督信号注入图像分类训练中，推理时模型不变。

Result: ImageNet上标准ViT骨干提升最多+2.7个百分点，迁移任务平均+1.0个百分点；相比视觉知识蒸馏，在相同计算量下更准确，或相同准确率下快33%。

Conclusion: TextTeacher作为特征空间预处理器，在训练早期塑造深层表征，通过补充语义线索提升泛化能力，开销可忽略且保持纯视觉模型的简洁性与推理速度。

Abstract: The platonic representation hypothesis suggests that sufficiently large models converge to a shared representation geometry, even across modalities. Motivated by this, we ask: Can the semantic knowledge of a language model efficiently improve a vision model? As an answer, we introduce TextTeacher, a simple auxiliary objective that injects text embeddings as additional information into image classification training. TextTeacher uses readily available image captions, a pre-trained and frozen text encoder, and a lightweight projection to produce semantic anchors that efficiently guide representations during training while leaving the inference-time model unchanged. On ImageNet with standard ViT backbones, TextTeacher improves accuracy by up to +2.7 percentage points (p.p.) and yields consistent transfer gains (on average +1.0 p.p.) under the same recipe and compute. It outperforms vision knowledge distillation, yielding more accuracy at a constant compute budget or similar accuracy, but 33% faster. Our analysis indicates that TextTeacher acts as a feature-space preconditioner, shaping deeper layers in the first stages of training, and aiding generalization by supplying complementary semantic cues. TextTeacher adds negligible overhead, requires no costly multimodal training of the target model and preserves the simplicity and latency of pure vision models.
  Project page with code and captions: https://nauen-it.de/publications/text-teacher

</details>


### [65] [OPERA: An Agent for Image Restoration with End-to-End Joint Planning-Execution Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22104)
*Feng Zhu,Shuyang Xie,Yihan Zeng,Ming Liu,Wangmeng Zuo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出OPERA框架，通过强化学习优化规划空间和协同训练执行工具，以端到端方式联合优化图像恢复的规划与执行，在多种退化场景中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于代理的图像恢复方法受限于隐式约束的规划空间以及独立预训练工具之间缺乏协调，导致性能受限。

Method: 提出OPERA框架：(1) 规划端使用强化学习直接优化组合规划空间，以最终恢复质量为奖励；(2) 执行端引入代理引导的协同训练，使恢复工具在序列组合下学习协作行为。

Result: 在多退化基准和真实数据集上，OPERA在多种复杂退化场景中一致优于全能恢复模型和现有基于代理的方法。

Conclusion: 联合优化规划与执行的端到端框架能有效突破隐式规划限制和工具间缺乏协调的瓶颈，显著提升复杂混合退化下的图像恢复性能。

Abstract: Real-world image restoration is challenging due to complex and interacting mixed degradations. Recent agent-based approaches address this problem by composing multiple task-specific restoration tools. However, empirical analysis reveals that their performance is fundamentally limited by implicitly constrained planning spaces and the lack of coordination among independently pretrained tools. To address these issues, we propose OPERA (Optimized Planning-Execution Restoration Agent), a framework that jointly optimizes restoration planning and tool execution in an end-to-end manner. On the planning side, OPERA uses reinforcement learning to directly optimize tool composition over a combinatorial plan space, with the final restoration quality as the reward. On the execution side, OPERA introduces agent-guided co-training of restoration tools, enabling them to learn cooperative behaviors under sequential composition. Extensive experiments on multi-degradation benchmarks and real-world datasets demonstrate that OPERA consistently outperforms both all-in-one restoration models and existing agent-based methods across diverse and complex degradation scenarios.

</details>


### [66] [MotionDPS: Motion-Compensated 3D Brain MRI Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22121)
*Antonio Ortiz-Gonzalez,Erich Kobler,Lukas Schletter,Alexander Effland*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种统一的贝叶斯框架，结合预训练3D复数值分数基扩散模型作为解剖先验，联合估计解剖图像、刚体运动参数和线圈灵敏度图，实现无监督的运动校正3D MRI重建，在严重运动和高加速场景下优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MRI对患者运动高度敏感，传统回顾性运动补偿在加速采集中因联合重建与运动估计的ill-posed性质而极具挑战，现有方法缺乏有效的无监督解决方案。

Method: 构建贝叶斯框架，将预训练3D复数值分数基扩散模型作为图像先验嵌入物理前向模型；通过交替执行扩散后验图像更新与近端优化步骤估计运动参数和线圈灵敏度图，实现无监督联合推理。

Result: 在模拟和真实运动脑部MRI数据集上，该方法在图像质量和运动鲁棒性方面均优于经典和基于学习的SOTA运动校正技术，尤其在剧烈运动和高加速倍数下优势显著。

Conclusion: 将扩散模型作为结构化先验与物理模型结合的运动校正框架可行且有效，无需成对无运动训练数据即可实现高鲁棒性的3D MRI重建。

Abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is highly susceptible to patient motion due to its relatively long acquisition times and the fact that data are acquired sequentially in k-space. Even small patient movements introduce phase inconsistencies across measurements, leading to severe artifacts such as blurring, ghosting, and geometric distortions that can compromise diagnostic quality. Retrospective motion compensation remains challenging, particularly in accelerated acquisitions, due to the ill-posed nature of the joint reconstruction and motion estimation problem. In this work, we propose a unified Bayesian framework for motion-compensated 3D MRI that jointly estimates the anatomical image, rigid-body motion parameters, and coil sensitivity maps directly from motion-corrupted k-space data. Our approach integrates pretrained 3D complex-valued score-based diffusion models as expressive anatomical image priors within a physics-based forward model. Inference is performed by alternating diffusion posterior image updates with efficient proximal optimization steps for motion and coil sensitivity estimation, enabling fully unsupervised reconstruction without the need for paired motion-free training data. Experiments on simulated and real-motion brain MRI datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves improved image quality and motion robustness compared to state-of-the-art classical and learning-based motion correction techniques, particularly in the presence of severe motion and high acceleration.

</details>


### [67] [AesFormer: Transform Everyday Photos into Beautiful Memories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22126)
*Tianxiang Du,Hulingxiao He,Yuxin Peng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出AesFormer，一个两阶段框架（美学规划+图像编辑），用于美学照片重构（APR），通过结构重建提升照片美学质量，同时保留主体身份和场景语义。结合GRPO-A强化学习、视频语料挖掘管线（VCMP）和AesRecon基准，实验表明性能显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有照片增强方法无法修复构图、视角、姿态等结构性缺陷，且已有编辑模型缺乏美学理解，生成的编辑在美学上薄弱。因此需要一种能理解美学并执行结构性重构的方法。

Method: 提出AesFormer两阶段框架：Stage 1 AesThinker美学动作模型分析7个渐进摄影维度并输出可执行编辑动作，采用GRPO-A强化学习鼓励多样化动作探索；Stage 2 AesEditor根据动作执行结构性编辑。构建VCMP语料管线与AesRecon基准（9,071对严格对齐的差/好图像对）。

Result: AesFormer在APR任务上显著提升性能，与Nano Banana Pro竞争力相当。代码已开源。

Conclusion: 将美学规划与图像编辑解耦的两阶段策略有效提升了美学照片重构质量，GRPO-A和VCMP对模型性能有重要贡献。

Abstract: In everyday photography, aesthetically appealing moments are often captured with structural flaws (e.g., composition, camera viewpoint, or pose) that existing retouching and portrait enhancement methods cannot fix. We formulate Aesthetic Photo Reconstruction (APR) as improving a photo's aesthetic quality via structural reconstruction while preserving subject identity and scene semantics. Although recent advances in image editing models make APR feasible, they often lack aesthetic understanding, yielding edits that are semantically plausible yet aesthetically weak. To address this, we propose AesFormer, a two-stage framework that decouples aesthetic planning from image editing. In Stage 1, an aesthetic action model (AesThinker) analyzes the input along seven progressive photographic dimensions and outputs executable editing actions; we further apply GRPO-A to encourage broad exploration over diverse action plans beyond SFT. In Stage 2, an action-conditioned editor (AesEditor) performs structural edits guided by these actions. To support APR, we build a video-based corpus-mining pipeline (VCMP) and construct AesRecon, a benchmark of 9,071 strictly aligned (poor, good) image pairs. Experiments show that AesFormer substantially improves APR performance and is competitive with Nano Banana Pro. Code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/AesFormer_ICML2026.

</details>


### [68] [Accelerating Vision Foundation Models with Drop-in Depthwise Convolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22132)
*Carmelo Scribano,Mohammad Mahdi,Nedyalko Prisadnikov,Yuqian Fu,Giorgia Franchini,Danda Pani Paudel,Marko Bertogna,Luc Van Gool*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出利用ViT中部分注意力头具有卷积特性，用高效的深度可分离卷积层替换这些头，在保持特征提取能力的同时实现17-20%的推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练的视觉基础模型(ViT)推理成本高，难以部署在资源受限设备上，需要在不损失特征提取能力的前提下加速推理。

Method: 1) 发现部分注意力头具有固有卷积行为；2) 设计高效的深度可分离卷积层作为这些头的替代；3) 提出识别可替换头的策略；4) 引入微调过程恢复下游任务性能。

Result: 在图像分类和分割任务上实现17-20%的推理加速，性能下降极小。

Conclusion: 通过利用注意力头的卷积特性，可以用轻量卷积层替换部分注意力头，有效加速ViT推理而保持性能。

Abstract: Pretrained vision foundation models deliver strong performance across tasks with limited fine-tuning. However, their Vision Transformer (ViT) backbones impose high inference costs, limiting deployment on resource-constrained devices. In this work, we accelerate large-scale pretrained ViTs while preserving their feature extraction capabilities by exploiting the intrinsic convolution-like behavior of some attention heads. Specifically, we introduce an efficient depthwise convolution-based layer that serves as a drop-in replacement for these heads. Additionally, we propose simple strategies to identify which heads can be replaced and introduce a fine-tuning procedure that recovers downstream task performance. Across both image classification and segmentation tasks, our method achieves 17-20\% percent inference speedup with minimal performance degradation. We validate the approach through detailed derivations, extensive experiments, and efficiency benchmarks. The reference implementation is publicly available.

</details>


### [69] [EventGait: Towards Robust Gait Recognition with Event Streams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22139)
*Senyan Xu,Shuai Chen,Chuanfu Shen,Kean Liu,Zhijing Sun,Chengzhi Cao,Xueyang Fu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出EventGait，一种基于事件相机的双流步态识别框架，通过动态流（混合脉冲专家MoSE）和静态流（跨模态结构对齐CroSA）分别建模运动与形状，在合成和真实事件步态基准上达到了SOTA，尤其在低光场景下显著优于传统相机方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统相机在非受控环境下（光照变化、运动模糊）易受影响，而事件相机具有微秒级时间分辨率和宽动态范围，但现有事件方法将事件流聚合为事件图像，丢失了细粒度运动动态，因此亟需设计能保留事件优势的步态识别框架。

Method: 提出端到端双流框架EventGait：(1) 动态流采用混合脉冲专家（MoSE），利用不同神经元常数适应复杂运动与光照；(2) 静态流通过跨模态结构对齐（CroSA）借助大规模视觉基础模型学习密集形状表征；(3) 引入合成数据集SUSTech1K-E和CCGR-Mini-E。

Result: 在合成和真实事件步态基准上达到SOTA；正常条件下与相机方法可比，低光场景下显著超越；代码和数据集已开源。

Conclusion: 事件驱动步态分析在鲁棒性和潜力上优于传统相机方法，尤其是在低光照等极端环境下，EventGait为事件步态识别设定了新的标杆。

Abstract: Gait recognition enables non-intrusive, privacy-preserving identification but suffers in uncontrolled environments due to illumination and motion sensitivity of conventional cameras. In this work, we explore gait recognition using event cameras, which offer microsecond temporal resolution and high dynamic range, naturally capturing robust dynamic cues and suppressing static noise. Existing event-based approaches typically aggregate event streams into event images over long time windows, thereby discarding fine-grained motion dynamics critical for gait recognition. Therefore, we propose \textbf{EventGait}, an end-to-end dual-stream framework that separately models motion and shape while preserving the advantages of events. Our dynamic stream leverages a Mixture of Spiking Experts (MoSE) with diverse neuron constants for robust dynamic perception across complex motion and illumination scenes, while the static stream learns dense shape representations via Cross-modal Structure Alignment (CroSA) with large vision foundation models. To address the absence of large-scale event-based gait datasets, we introduce a synthesis pipeline and release two new benchmarks: SUSTech1K-E and CCGR-Mini-E. Extensive experiments have shown that event-based gait recognition not only achieves results comparable to camera-based gait recognition under normal conditions but also significantly outperforms it in low-light scenarios. Our approach sets a new state of the art on both synthesized and real-world event-based gait benchmarks, highlighting the robustness and potential of event-driven gait analysis. The code and datasets are released at https://github.com/QUEAHREN/EventGait.

</details>


### [70] [One Sentence, One Drama: Personalized Short-Form Drama Generation via Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22144)
*Yufei Shi,Weilong Yan,Naixuan Huang,Yucheng Chen,Chenyu Zhang,Tao He,Si Yong Yeo,Ming Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出层级化多智能体框架，将用户单句创意转化为完整短剧，通过辩论式剧本生成、3D空间参考帧、多阶段审校循环解决叙事节奏、空间一致性和制作质量控制问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数字短剧制作依赖一次性LLM生成剧本和松散耦合管线，无法满足短剧生成的三个关键需求：叙事节奏（钩子弱、升级不足、结尾平淡）、空间一致性（场景布局漂移、角色位置不一致）以及制作级质量控制（需要大量人工审核修正）。

Method: 提出"一句话，一部剧"框架，包含三个核心组件：(1)多智能体辩论式故事生成模块，强制短剧节奏和叙事连贯性；(2)3D基础首帧生成机制，建立共享空间参考确保角色位置和场景布局一致；(3)多阶段审校循环，在剧本、视觉和视频生成阶段进行全面错误检测和定向修订。此外引入场景级BGM匹配和场景过渡规划提升沉浸体验。

Result: 在自建Short-Drama-Bench基准上，该方法在叙事质量、跨片段一致性和整体观看体验上显著优于现有管线。

Conclusion: 层级化多智能体框架结合3D空间参考和多阶段审校，能有效解决短剧生成中的叙事节奏、空间一致性和质量控制三大核心挑战。

Abstract: Existing approaches for digital short-drama production typically rely on one-shot LLM generated scripts and loosely coupled pipelines, which fail to satisfy three key requirements of short-drama generation: (1) narrative pacing, resulting in weak hooks, insufficient escalation, and unattractive endings; (2) spatial consistency, leading to drifting scene layouts and inconsistent character positions across clips; and (3) production-level quality control, requiring extensive manual review and correction across script and visual stages. We present One Sentence, One Drama, a hierarchical multi-agent framework that transforms a user's single-sentence idea into a fully produced short drama through structured intermediate modules and iterative refinement. Our approach is built upon three key components: (1) a multi-agent debate-based story generation module that enforces short-drama pacing and narrative coherence; (2) a 3D-grounded first-frame generation mechanism that establishes a shared spatial reference for consistent character positioning and scene layout across clips; and (3) multi-stage reviewer loops that perform comprehensive error detection and targeted revision across script, visual, and video generation stages. We also introduce scene-level BGM matching and scene transition planning to improve the audience's immersive experience. To systematically evaluate this task, we introduce Short-Drama-Bench, a benchmark that extends standard video quality metrics with short-drama-specific criteria. Experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing pipelines in narrative quality, cross-clip consistency, and overall viewing experience.

</details>


### [71] [Flow-based Gaussian Splatting for Continuous-Scale Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22147)
*Jiangwei Mo,Xi Lu,Hanlin Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FlowGS提出了一种基于流匹配和高斯泼溅的遥感图像任意尺度超分辨率重建框架，在保持高感知质量的同时显著提升推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型超分辨率方法推理步骤多（40-1000步）、效率低，且难以灵活处理连续尺度的超分辨率任务，无法满足遥感图像在实际应用中的高效需求。

Method: 1）通过流匹配（Flow Matching）和捷径一致性约束，建模高低分辨率图像间的高频细节表示，学习从噪声到细节先验的连续概率流；2）利用2D高斯泼溅构建连续特征场，实现任意查询位置的灵活重建。

Result: 在连续尺度和固定尺度的超分辨率设置下，FlowGS均能达到与现有方法竞争的感知质量，同时大幅提升推理效率。

Conclusion: FlowGS有效解决了扩散模型推理慢和连续尺度灵活性不足的问题，为遥感图像的生成式超分辨率提供了一种高效且可扩展的新方案。

Abstract: High-resolution remote sensing images (RSIs) are crucial for Earth observation applications, yet acquiring them is often limited by sensor constraints and costs. In recent years, generative super-resolution (SR) methods, particularly diffusion models, have made significant progress. However, they typically require slow iterative inference with 40--1000 steps and exhibit limited flexibility in continuous-scale SR settings. To address these issues, we propose FlowGS, a generative reconstruction framework for arbitrary-scale SR of RSIs. FlowGS models the high-frequency detail representations between high- and low-resolution images and learns a continuous probability flow from noise to detail priors via flow matching (FM) constrained by shortcut consistency, thereby reducing generative complexity and improving inference efficiency. Additionally, we employ 2D Gaussian splatting to construct a continuous feature field, thereby enabling flexible reconstruction at arbitrary query locations. Experimental results show that FlowGS delivers competitive perceptual quality compared with existing methods in both continuous-scale and fixed-scale SR settings, with substantially improved inference efficiency.

</details>


### [72] [Balancing Uncertainty and Diversity of Samples: Leveraging Diversity of Least, High Confidence Samples for Effective Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22169)
*Vipul Arya,S. H. Shabbeer Basha,Srikrishna U N,Sunainha Vijay,Snehasis Mukherjee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出四种新型混合主动学习采样方法，其中LCD（Least Confident and Diverse）方法通过同时选择不确定且多样的样本，在多个实验上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型依赖大量标注数据，而人工标注成本高昂。现有主动学习方法仅从单一维度（多样性或不确定性）选择样本，限制了模型性能。

Method: 提出四种混合采样方法，结合不确定性与多样性两个维度进行样本选择。核心方法LCD（Least Confident and Diverse）同时选取低置信度（不确定）且多样化的样本。

Result: LCD方法在高低置信度样本的实验中均一致优于现有最先进方法，表明选择不确定且多样的实例有助于模型学习更独特的特征。

Conclusion: 混合采样策略（LCD）有效结合了不确定性和多样性，比单一维度采样更优，代码已开源。

Abstract: Deep learning models, including Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs), have achieved state-of-the-art performance on various computer vision tasks such as object classification, detection, segmentation, generation, and many more. However, these models are data-hungry as they require more training data to learn millions or billions of parameters. Especially for supervised learning tasks, curating a large number of labeled samples for model training is an expensive and time-consuming task. Active Learning (AL) has been used to address this problem for many years. Existing active learning methods aim at choosing the samples for annotation from a pool of unlabeled samples that are either diverse or uncertain. Choosing such samples may hinder the model's performance as we pool based on one dimension, i.e., either diverse or uncertain. In this paper, we propose four novel hybrid sampling methods for pooling both easy and hard samples, which are also diverse. To verify the efficacy of the proposed methods, extensive experiments are conducted using high and low-confidence samples separately. We observe from our experiments that the proposed hybrid sampling method, Least Confident and Diverse (LCD), consistently performs better compared to state-of-the-art methods. It is observed that selecting uncertain and diverse instances helps the model learn more distinct features. The codes related to this study will be available at https://github.com/XXX/LCD.

</details>


### [73] [Enhancing Multimodal Large Language Models for Safety-Critical Driving Video Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22185)
*Tomaso Trinci,Henrique Piñeiro Monteagudo,Leonardo Taccari*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种融合视频帧、高频遥测数据（IMU/GPS）和视觉模型语义信息的多模态流水线，用于生成伪标签（描述性标注和问答对）以微调MLLM，使其能在有限计算资源下准确识别和描述驾驶安全关键事件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM在通用视觉理解上表现优异，但在安全关键的驾驶场景中（如碰撞或接近碰撞）无法准确感知和推理罕见的高动态事件。

Method: 构建流水线，融合下采样视频帧、同步高频遥测数据（IMU和GPS）以及专用视觉模型的语义信息；生成高质量伪标签（描述性文本和问答对）；使用DoRA适配器微调开源QwenVL-2.5模型。

Result: 在仅使用不到5000万个可训练参数且计算预算有限的情况下，模型在识别和解释安全关键事件方面取得显著改进。

Conclusion: 所提方法可低成本、高效地增强MLLM在真实驾驶场景中对安全关键事件的感知与推理能力。

Abstract: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in general visual understanding. However, their application to safety-critical driving scenarios remains limited by an inability to accurately perceive and reason about rare high-stakes dynamic events, such as collisions or near-collisions.
