We formalize representation-level sensitive information leakage operationally through reconstruction: a shared cache artifact is unsafe if an adversarial decoder can recover agent-specific sensitive inputs from it. This leads to an adversarial training formulation in which the adversary learns to reconstruct sensitive inputs, while LCGuard learns transformations that preserve task-relevant semantics and reduce reconstructable information. Empirical evaluations across multiple model families and multi-agent benchmarks show that LCGuard consistently reduces reconstruction-based leakage and attack success rates while maintaining competitive task performance compared to standard KV-sharing baselines.

</details>


### [293] [Gated DeltaNet-2: Decoupling Erase and Write in Linear Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22791)
*Ali Hatamizadeh,Yejin Choi,Jan Kautz*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Gated DeltaNet-2，将Delta注意力模型的擦除门和写入门解耦为独立的通道级门控，解决了此前模型用一个标量控制两种操作的问题，在语言建模、推理和长上下文检索上均优于Mamba-2、Gated DeltaNet、KDA等基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Delta注意力模型（如Gated DeltaNet和KDA）使用单一标量门控同时控制"擦除旧内容"和"写入新内容"两种不同操作，限制了记忆编辑的灵活性，导致压缩记忆时容易混淆已有关联。

Method: 将原有的单一标量门控解耦为独立的通道级擦除门（erase gate, b_t）和写入门（write gate, w_t），并继承了KDA的通道级衰减和Gated DeltaNet的自适应遗忘机制。同时推导了快权重更新视角、支持通道级衰减的chunkwise WY算法，以及门控感知的反向传播。

Result: 在1.3B参数、100B FineWeb-Edu token训练下，Gated DeltaNet-2在语言建模、常识推理和检索任务上全面优于Mamba-2、Gated DeltaNet、KDA和Mamba-3，尤其在长上下文RULER多键检索任务上优势显著。

Conclusion: 分离擦除和写入门控能有效提升线性注意力模型的记忆编辑能力，兼顾高效训练和长上下文推理，在循环和混合架构中均表现优异。

Abstract: Linear attention replaces the unbounded cache of softmax attention with a fixed-size recurrent state, reducing sequence mixing to linear time and decoding to constant memory. The hard part is not just what to forget, but how to edit this compressed memory without scrambling existing associations. Delta-rule models subtract the current read before writing a new value, and Kimi Delta Attention (KDA) sharpens forgetting with channel-wise decay. But the active edit still uses a single scalar gate to control two different things: how much old content to erase on the key side and how much new content to commit on the value side. We introduce Gated DeltaNet-2, which generalizes both Gated DeltaNet and KDA by inheriting adaptive forgetting and channel-wise decay while addressing their shared limitation, the scalar tie between erasing and writing. Gated Delta Rule-2 separates these roles with a channel-wise erase gate b_t and a channel-wise write gate w_t, reducing to KDA when both gates collapse to the same scalar and to Gated DeltaNet when the decay also collapses. We derive a fast-weight update view, a chunkwise WY algorithm with channel-wise decay absorbed into asymmetric erase factors, and a gate-aware backward pass that preserves efficient parallel training. At 1.3B parameters trained on 100B FineWeb-Edu tokens, Gated DeltaNet-2 achieves the strongest overall results among Mamba-2, Gated DeltaNet, KDA, and Mamba-3 variants across language modeling, commonsense reasoning, and retrieval. Its advantage is most pronounced on long-context RULER needle-in-a-haystack benchmarks, where it improves the evaluated multi-key retrieval setting and remains strong in both recurrent and hybrid settings. Code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/GatedDeltaNet-2.

</details>


### [294] [MOSS: Self-Evolution through Source-Level Rewriting in Autonomous Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22794)
*Qianshu Cai,Yonggang Zhang,Xianzhang Jia,Wei Xue,Jun Song,Xinmei Tian,Yike Guo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MOSS是一个能够在源代码层面进行自我重写的自主智能体系统，通过自动化故障证据收集、确定性多阶段代码修改、回放验证和容器热替换，在不需人工干预下提升性能（如OpenClaw上从0.25提升至0.61）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自演化智能体系统仅能在文本可变的工件层面（如技能文件、提示配置、记忆模式等）进行演化，无法触及智能体架构的核心代码（路由、钩子顺序、状态不变量、调度等），导致大量结构性故障无法修复。

Method: MOSS系统：1) 自动收集生产环境故障证据批次；2) 通过确定性多阶段流水线进行源代码级修改（外接编码智能体CLI负责改代码，MOSS保留阶段排序和裁决）；3) 在临时试验工作器中回放批次验证候选代码；4) 通过用户同意+健康探针门控的容器热替换实现部署与回滚。

Result: 在OpenClaw基准上，MOSS单轮循环后将四个任务的平均评分从0.25提升至0.61，全程无需人工干预。

Conclusion: 源代码级自适应相比文本级演化是更通用、更强大的演化介质，能够修复结构级故障，且不会因长上下文漂移而退化。

Abstract: Autonomous agentic systems are largely static after deployment: they do not learn from user interactions, and recurring failures persist until the next human-driven update ships a fix. Self-evolving agents have emerged in response, but all confine evolution to text-mutable artifacts -- skill files, prompt configurations, memory schemas, workflow graphs -- and leave the agent harness untouched. Since routing, hook ordering, state invariants, and dispatch live in code rather than in any text artifact, an entire class of structural failure is physically unreachable from the text layer. We argue that source-level adaptation is a fundamentally more general medium: it is Turing-complete, a strict superset of every text-mutable scope, takes effect deterministically rather than through base-model compliance, and does not erode under long-context drift. We present MOSS, a system that performs self-rewriting at the source level on production agentic substrates. Each evolution is anchored to an automatically curated batch of production-failure evidence and proceeds through a deterministic multi-stage pipeline; code modification is delegated to a pluggable external coding-agent CLI while MOSS retains stage ordering and verdicts. Candidates are verified by replaying the batch against the candidate image in ephemeral trial workers, then promoted via user-consent-gated, in-place container swap with health-probe-gated rollback. On OpenClaw, MOSS lifts a four-task mean grader score from 0.25 to 0.61 in a single cycle without human intervention.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [295] [Requirements Perception Gap across Stakeholders: A Comparative Survey of Aged Care Digital Health Software](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21495)
*Yuqing Xiao,John Grundy,Anuradha Madugalla,Elizabeth Manias*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过调查249名参与者（老年人、照护者、软件开发人员），揭示了老年护理数字健康软件中的"需求鸿沟"：开发人员倾向于优先考虑高级功能，高估了用户对易用性等非功能性需求的满意度；而老年人和照护者则更看重简洁性和可靠性。研究提供了利益相关者差距分析，以指导未来的协同设计和产品决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有老年护理数字健康软件往往未能满足多方利益相关者的实际需求，不同群体（老年人、照护者、开发者）之间的需求差异尚未被系统比较和理解，导致产品设计偏离用户期望。

Method: 基于现有系统综述发现设计问卷调查，采用混合方法（定量问卷+定性开放式回答），对249名参与者（103名老年人、41名照护者、105名开发者）进行数据分析，使用推断统计比较满意度，结合主题分析处理定性数据。

Result: 发现显著的"需求鸿沟"：开发者高估用户对核心非功能性需求（如易用性、响应性）的满意度，且对现有功能性特征更为挑剔；而老年人和照护者更重视简洁性和可靠性，而非功能密度。

Conclusion: 利益相关者差距分析可为未来协同设计、近期产品决策以及老年护理数字健康领域的隐私设计建议提供指导。

Abstract: We sought to explore and compare the perspectives of three key stakeholder groups: older adults, caregivers (formal health providers and informal caregivers), and digital health software developers on key functional and non-functional requirements. We conducted a survey, designed based on the findings from an existing systematic review, to gather and analyse data related to the three stakeholder groups' (dis)satisfaction with current aged care digital health software and their views on key future aged care software requirements. A mixed-methods survey approach integrated quantitative questionnaire data and qualitative open-ended responses from a total sample of 249, comprised of older adults (103), formal and informal caregivers (41), and software developers (105). Data analysis utilised a mixed methods approach, employing inferential statistics to compare group satisfaction levels and thematic analysis for qualitative open-ended responses. Our analysis reveals a significant "Requirements Gap". Software developers tend to prioritise advanced features and functional requirements, significantly overestimating user satisfaction with core NFRs such as ease of use and responsiveness. Conversely, developers were more critical of existing functional features compared to older adults and caregivers, who prioritised simplicity and reliability over feature density. By combining quantitative and qualitative analysis, we identified where stakeholder priorities align and where they diverge across functional and non-functional requirements in both the current designs they used and the future designs they desire. Our findings present a stakeholder gap analysis that can guide future co-design processes, near-term product decisions, and privacy-by-design recommendations in aged care digital health.

</details>


### [296] [Articulate but Wrong: Self-Review Failures in LLM-Based Code Modernization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21537)
*Gokul Chandra Purnachandra Reddy,Aditya Lolla,Harsha Sanku*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究探讨了LLM在代码现代化迁移中，能否可靠识别自身输出是否改变了程序行为。基于11个生产级LLM、1980次调用发现：语义保持漂移普遍存在（陷阱代码漂移率39.7% vs 基线7.0%）；模型自审不可靠（31.7%的漂移被自己认可）；漂移率与模型能力/价格非单调相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当LLM被用来将遗留代码迁移到现代技术栈时，一个关键问题是：同一个模型能否可靠地识别自己的输出是否在静默地改变程序的可观察行为？这关乎代码现代化任务的安全性和可信度。

Method: 在11个生产级LLM（来自7个不同家族）上执行1,980次真实现代化调用，使用60个Python 2代码片段（平衡设计：语义陷阱vs良性对照），通过类型严格的行为oracle评估每个输出，然后让每个模型自我判断其输出是否保持行为等价性。

Result: (1) 语义陷阱代码漂移率39.7% vs 良性代码7.0%；(2) 漂移集中在特定代码片段上，模型间高度一致（Pearson r=0.52）；(3) 自审不可靠，31.7%的漂移被自己认可，模型自漏率呈双峰分布（0%到100%）；(4) 漂移率5.6%-46.7%，与模型能力/价格非单调相关。

Conclusion: LLM在代码现代化中的语义保持问题普遍且严重，自我审查机制不可靠，且该问题具有任务结构性特征，不能简单地通过扩大模型规模解决。研究呼吁对代码现代化任务建立更可靠的行为验证机制。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly used to migrate legacy code to modern stacks. We ask a deceptively simple question: when an LLM modernizes legacy code, can the same model be relied upon to recognize when its own output silently changes observable behavior? We run 1,980 real modernization calls across 11 production LLMs from 7 distinct families on a balanced 60-snippet legacy-Python-2 corpus, evaluate every output with a type-strict behavioral oracle, and then ask each model to judge whether its own output preserves behavior. We report four findings. (1) Semantic-preservation drift is prevalent and sharply separable from a cleanly-controlled baseline: semantic-trap snippets drift in 39.7% of attempts versus 7.0% on benign-control code that requires no real modernization (+32.7 percentage points; n=660 each). (2) Drift concentrates on specific snippets that fail across models: pairwise model agreement on which snippets are hard is high (mean Pearson r=0.52), and a small core of numeric-semantics snippets fails for nearly every model and every prompt phrasing. (3) Self-review by the producing model is not a reliable safety net: across all semantic drift cases, 31.7% are silently endorsed by the same model that produced them (83/262), and the per-model self-miss rate is strongly bimodal -- ranging from 0% on five models to 100% on one widely deployed model -- with several models explicitly articulating the very Py2/Py3 semantic distinction that broke their output, then declaring behavior preserved. (4) Drift rate is non-monotone in model capability and price: per-model rates range 5.6%-46.7% and do not track model capability cleanly, indicating the failure is task-structural rather than driven by model scale. All code, prompts, the 60-snippet corpus, the behavioral oracle, the output extractor, and the raw model outputs are released.

</details>


### [297] [RefusalBench: Why Refusal Rate Misranks Frontier LLMs on Biological Research Prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21545)
*Lukas Weidener,Marko Brkić,Mihailo Jovanović,Emre Ulgac,Aakaash Meduri*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: RefusalBench 是一个包含141个提示的匹配三元组基准，用于评估19个前沿大语言模型在生物学研究提示上的拒绝行为。结果显示：严格拒绝率从0.1%到94.6%不等；管辖权不能预测拒绝行为，但提供商身份可以（Anthropic的OR=21.03）；拒绝率排名不能准确反映安全校准；9个模型在双用途层级表现出"边拒绝边帮忙"的部分遵从模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前沿大语言模型被广泛部署为生物学研究工作流的主干，但缺乏共享的证据基础来比较它们在合法研究提示上的拒绝行为。

Method: 构建RefusalBench基准：141个提示组成47个匹配三元组，保持任务框架不变，仅改变生物风险层级（良性、边界、双用途）。包含15个"应拒绝"的正控制模块。评估19个前沿模型（截至2026年5月快照），使用严格拒绝率、Youden's J等指标。

Result: 严格拒绝率范围0.1%-94.6%；管辖权不预测拒绝（p=0.393）；Anthropic的API堆栈预测拒绝的OR=21.03；99.8%的Anthropic严格拒绝使用相同安全策略裁决代码；Grok 4.20拒绝率仅排第七但歧视能力最高（J=0.787）；Claude Opus 4.7的J下降65%；9个模型表现出"边拒绝边帮忙"模式。

Conclusion: 当前LLM安全拒绝行为高度碎片化且不可预测，拒绝率排名不能可靠反映安全校准质量；提供商身份（尤其是访问路径层面）比模型权重或管辖权更能预测拒绝行为；二元拒绝指标不足以捕捉部分遵从等细微安全失败模式。

Abstract: Frontier large language models are increasingly deployed as orchestration backbones for biological research workflows, yet no shared evidence base exists for comparing their refusal behaviour on legitimate research prompts. RefusalBench, introduced here, is a matched-triple benchmark of 141 prompts in 47 bundles that holds task framing constant while varying only biological risk tier (benign, borderline, dual-use), enabling tier-conditioned comparisons robust to subdomain confounding. A 15-prompt should-refuse positive-control module establishes per-model calibration floors; three models fail to refuse even these prompts. Across 19 frontier models in the May 2026 snapshot, strict refusal rates span 0.1% to 94.6% on identical prompts. Jurisdiction does not predict refusal in this snapshot (Mann-Whitney U, p = 0.393; EU n = 1, US bimodal); provider identity does, with Anthropic's API stack predicting refusal at OR = 21.03 (95% CI: 14.58-30.34 prompt-clustered; 5.70-77.55 under model-clustered GEE). This effect is best read as access-path-level rather than model-weight-level: 99.8% of Anthropic's strict refusals carry the same safety_policy adjudicated reason code, consistent with a small set of canonical refusal templates rather than case-by-case model reasoning. Strict refusal rate misranks safety calibration: Grok 4.20 achieves the highest tier discrimination (Youden's J = 0.787) while ranking only seventh by overall refusal rate, and Claude Opus 4.7's J dropped 65% from prior versions with no improvement in dual-use detection. Nine of 18 frontier models exhibit a hedge-but-help partial-compliance pattern at dual-use tier that binary refusal metrics cannot detect.

</details>


### [298] [A Dataset of Reproducible Flaky-Test Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21677)
*Suzzana Rafi,Mahbub-Ul-Hoque Sumon,Md Erfan,Maruf Morshed Khan,August Shi,Wing Lam*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了ReproFlake，一个包含1115个可复现的浮动测试（flaky tests）的数据集，覆盖四种浮动测试类别。该数据集首次提供了可复现的编译环境、失败复现脚本、自动修复脚本以及执行日志，解决了现有数据集缺乏可复现性和完整性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 浮动测试的非确定性导致其失败难以复现，现有数据集往往相互独立且信息不完整（如只包含特定类别、缺少失败日志或仅来自开发者报告或自动工具），缺乏统一的、可复现的研究基准。

Method: 从开发者问题报告和流行的浮动测试数据集中筛选整理，构建了ReproFlake数据集。提供了（1）可复现的编译环境，（2）失败复现脚本，（3）自动应用修复的脚本，（4）通过/失败的执行日志。并制定了贡献指南。

Result: 建立了包含1115个可复现浮动测试的数据集，覆盖四个类别。通过实验发现：错误信息有助于识别浮动测试类别并指导修复；未解决的编译失败突显了构建遗留项目的挑战；了解典型修复位置有助于优先安排修复工作。

Conclusion: ReproFlake是首个提供完整可复现性的浮动测试数据集，为研究人员提供了更好的基准平台，揭示了浮动测试复现中的挑战和修复特征。

Abstract: Flaky tests pass and fail non-deterministically when run on the same version of code. Although many techniques have been proposed to detect, debug, and repair flaky tests, reproducing their failures remains a major challenge due to their inherent nondeterminism. Many flaky test datasets exist to help researchers study them, but these datasets are often composed of disjoint sets of flaky tests, where each dataset provides unique information, such as flaky tests of different categories, failure logs of flaky tests, or flaky tests reported by developers vs. flaky tests found by automated tools. In this work, we aim to create a reproducible dataset of flaky tests, curated from both developer issue reports and a popular dataset of flaky tests. Compared to prior flaky test datasets, our dataset is the first to provide (1) a reproducible environment to compile flaky tests, (2) scripts to reproduce failures, (3) scripts to automatically apply flaky test fixes and ensure that the tests are no longer flaky, and (4) execution logs of flaky test passing and failing. We present ReproFlake, a dataset of 1115 reproducible flaky tests across four flaky test categories. We create guidelines to help others contribute to this reproducible dataset, and demonstrate how to use our dataset to understand challenges in reproducing flaky test failures (e.g., challenges researchers may face when using prior flaky test datasets), the characteristics (e.g., location of the fix and its correlation with the flaky test category), and difficulties researchers may face in using our dataset to collect additional information (e.g., code coverage) about flaky tests. Our findings show that error information helps identify flaky test categories and guide repairs, that unresolved compilation failures highlight challenges in building legacy projects, and knowing typical fix locations can help prioritize repair efforts.

</details>


### [299] [The 2nd Workshop on Agile Practice & Research: A Summary and Call For Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21690)
*Karen Eilers,Michael Neumann,Eva-Maria Schön,Mali Senapathi,Maria Rauschenberger,Tiago Silva da Silva*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文基于XP 2026第二届敏捷实践与研究工作坊，针对敏捷研究中存在的理论差距、时间差距和转移差距三大研究-实践鸿沟，通过结构化协作研讨提出四项改进建议（改进科学沟通、对齐新兴需求、强化合作激励、整合教育方法）和三项研究呼吁（开放科学、高质量实证、价值导向贡献），旨在弥合学术界与工业界之间的鸿沟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 敏捷软件开发虽历经二十余年学术研究与工业实践的互动，但两者之间仍存在显著差距（理论差距、时间差距、转移差距）。本文旨在识别这些差距的根源，并寻求学术界与 practitioners 共同协作的解决方案。

Method: 在XP 2026大会上举办第二届敏捷实践与研究工作坊，以结构化协作研讨方式进行。参与者先在前期会议中展示各自贡献，随后分组针对三大差距之一进行讨论，反思可能的原因与补救措施，最后由组织者综合结果形成四项命题与三项研究呼吁。

Result: 提出了弥合研究-实践鸿沟的四项建议：（1）改进科学沟通；（2）使研究更紧密地契合新兴工业需求；（3）为持续协作创建更强激励；（4）将教育方法融入研究实践。并形成三项研究呼吁：开放科学实践、更高实证质量标准、显式价值导向贡献。

Conclusion: 本文不仅提供了工作坊的总结，更发出了一项呼吁——加强学术界与工业界在研究与实践上的协作，以推动敏捷软件开发的持续演进。

Abstract: Agile software development has been shaped by the interplay between academic research and industrial practice for over two decades, yet notable gaps persist between both domains. This paper focuses on three research-practice gaps: the theory gap, the time gap, and the transfer gap. To address these, the 2nd Agile Practice & Research Workshop was held at the International Conference on Agile Software Development (XP) 2026 in São Paulo, Brazil, bringing researchers and practitioners together to identify root causes and develop joint solutions. Building on two preceding sessions in which contributions of participants had been presented, participants engaged in a structured collaborative session, working in small groups on one of the three gaps and reflecting on possible causes and remedies. The organizers synthesized the results into four propositions for improving the research-practice intersection: (1) improving scientific communication, (2) aligning research more closely with emerging industrial needs, (3) creating stronger incentives for sustained collaboration, and (4) integrating educational approaches into research practice. From these, three calls for research were formulated: (a) broader adoption of open science practices for transparency, reproducibility, and cumulative evidence; (b) higher empirical quality standards through stronger theoretical grounding and rigorous design; and (c) more explicit, value-oriented contributions that clearly articulate their practical and scientific relevance. The paper offers both a summary of the workshop and a call to strengthen research-practice collaboration.

</details>


### [300] [PITMuS: A Tool for Automated Bug Dataset Generation via Source-Level Mutant Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21930)
*Tasfia Tasnim,Soneya Binta Hossain*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出PITMuS工具，通过结合PIT的XML突变报告和Java字节码调试信息，自动将字节码级突变重构为源代码级别的结构化数据集（包含正确/错误代码对、文档和元数据），用于支持基于LLM的软件工程任务训练与评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM软件工程依赖的bug数据集（如Defects4J）存在静态性和数据污染风险，需要一种能生成新鲜、截止日期感知的数据集的互补策略。PIT虽能进行突变测试，但其XML格式的突变报告难以直接作为源代码级数据集使用。

Method: PITMuS将PIT的XML突变元数据与Java编译类文件的调试信息结合，定位并重构每个突变对应的源代码编辑操作，自动生成包含buggy/fixed代码对、文档上下文和元数据的结构化数据集。

Result: 在8个开源Java系统上进行了评估验证，且该工具可应用于任何能集成PIT的Java系统。

Conclusion: PITMuS成功弥合了PIT字节码级突变输出与源代码级数据集需求之间的鸿沟，为LLM驱动的软件工程任务提供了一种自动化、可扩展的污染感知数据生成方案。

Abstract: LLM-based software engineering increasingly depends on executable, context-rich bug artifacts: paired correct and buggy code, methods under test (MUTs), documentation, and metadata. These artifacts support the training and evaluation of automated bug localization and repair techniques, testing and test oracle generation methods, and documentation-driven automation. Although curated benchmarks (e.g., Defects4J) remain valuable, they are static and increasingly vulnerable to contamination as code models are trained on large public corpora. A complementary strategy is to generate fresh, cutoff-aware datasets by selecting real system versions and injecting controlled bugs at the source level.
  Mutation testing is a natural basis for this strategy: it applies predefined mutation operators to programs and records whether the existing test suite detects each injected change. PIT is a state-of-the-practice mutation testing tool for Java that performs mutation at the bytecode level. This design makes mutation testing fast and practical, but PITMuS reports mutants primarily through XML, making them difficult to inspect, replay, or reuse as structured source-level dataset records. To address this gap, we present PITMuS, which combines PITMuS XML metadata with debug information from compiled Java class files to localize and reconstruct the source edit corresponding to each mutant. PITMuS then automatically produces structured datasets containing source-level buggy and fixed code pairs, documentation context, and metadata for downstream training and evaluation. Although we evaluate PITMuS on eight open-source Java systems, it can be applied to any Java system where PITMuS can be integrated.

</details>


### [301] [Deterministic vs. Probabilistic Summarisation: An Empirical Trade-off Study in Design Pattern Centric Java Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21943)
*Najam Nazar,Christoph Treude*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过对比确定性（启发式）和概率性（LLM）代码摘要方法，发现概率性方法语义更强，确定性方法更简洁可复现，两者各有优劣。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化代码摘要对程序理解和文档化很重要，但确定性方法与LLM方法的相对优劣尚不清楚，需进行受控比较。

Method: 基于150个设计模式Java文件，比较规则NLG、SWUM和Mixtral概率方法，采用BERTScore、余弦相似度及Llama 3五维度评估，并进行Wilcoxon、Friedman检验和Spearman相关分析。

Result: 概率性摘要语义对齐和上下文覆盖更强；确定性摘要更简洁、完全可复现；LLM输出有变异性但整体趋势稳定。

Conclusion: 存在明确权衡：概率方法适合语义深度，确定性方法适合简洁性和可复现性，为代码摘要技术选择提供实践指导。

Abstract: Background: Automated code summarisation supports program comprehension and documentation, yet the relative strengths and limitations of deterministic (heuristic-based) and probabilistic (LLM-based) pipelines remain unclear. Aims: This paper presents a controlled empirical comparison of these paradigms for intent-oriented design-pattern code summarisation. Method: Using design-pattern-centric Java code as a structured testbed (150 files from three open-source repositories covering nine patterns), we compare a rule-based natural language generation (NLG) pipeline, a Software Word Usage Model (SWUM)-based approach, and a probabilistic pipeline based on the Mixtral LLM. Summaries are evaluated against human references using BERTScore and cosine similarity, complemented by rubric-based judgements produced by Llama 3 across five dimensions: accuracy, conciseness, adequacy, code-context awareness, and design-pattern fidelity. Statistical analysis includes Wilcoxon signed-rank tests (with effect sizes), Friedman tests with post-hoc corrections, and Spearman correlation for sensitivity analysis of rubric consistency. Results: Probabilistic summaries show stronger semantic alignment and richer contextual coverage, while deterministic approaches produce more concise and fully reproducible outputs. Prompt-sensitivity and multi-run analyses indicate variability in LLM outputs, though relative trends remain stable. Conclusions: A clear trade-off emerges: probabilistic methods favour semantic depth and contextual accuracy, whereas deterministic pipelines are preferable for brevity and reproducibility. These findings provide practical guidance for selecting code summarisation techniques.

</details>


### [302] [From Patches to Trajectories: Privileged Process Supervision for Software-Engineering Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21996)
*Murong Ma,Tianyu Chen,Yun Lin,Shuai Lu,Qinglin Zhu,Yeyun Gong,Zhiyong Huang,Peng Cheng,Yan Lu,Jin Song Dong*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: P2T利用开发者提供的参考补丁作为特权信息，通过逆向构建潜在过程图和前向筛选有效轨迹片段，在少量数据（1.8k）上提升SWE agent的SFT效果，Pass@1提升最高10.8%，推理成本降低约15%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SFT方法使用二进制验证器筛选教师轨迹，无法评估每个步骤的有效性和效率，且丢弃了开发者提供的参考补丁这一重要先验信息。

Method: 提出P2T方法：逆向阶段从参考补丁p*蒸馏出潜在过程图G*（包含上下文事实和解决方案里程碑）；前向阶段对教师轨迹的每个步骤进行基于G*的进度评分，通过防漏检的接地性检查，保留最短有效轨迹段。

Result: 在SWE-bench Verified上Pass@1提升最多10.8个百分点，每实例推理成本降低约15%；在SWE-bench Lite上结果一致。消融实验和定性分析证明是轨迹质量提升而非数据规模效应。

Conclusion: 利用参考补丁作为特权信息进行细粒度轨迹筛选，比单纯依赖二进制结果过滤更有效，为SWE agent训练提供了更好的数据质量-效率权衡。

Abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on long teacher trajectories is the dominant way to instill investigation and reasoning in open software-engineering (SWE) agents. Since every retained response becomes an imitation target, the student inherits the final outcome and intermediate flaws, including ungrounded leaps and redundant loops. High-quality training data must be effective(each step is grounded and narrows the agent's epistemic gap to the correct fix) and efficient(each step is information-bearing rather than redundant or looping). Existing recipes filter or relabel teacher rollouts using only a binary terminal verifier, which does not directly target these axes and provides no supervision on instances where the teacher fails.
  Most real issue includes a developer-authored reference patch, $p^\star$, revealing the file paths, runtime behaviors, and coding conventions presupposed by the correct fix, yet standard pipelines discard it. We propose Patches-to-Trajectories (P2T), which uses $p^\star$ as privileged information during curation and formulates trajectory construction as bi-objective optimization over per-step effectiveness and trajectory length. A reverse phase distills $p^\star$ into a latent process graph, $G^\star$, of contextual facts and solution milestones. A forward phase curates trajectories from blinded teacher continuations by scoring per-step progress against $G^\star$ under a leakage-blocking groundedness check and retaining the shortest effective segments.
  Using only 1.8k curated SWE-Gym instances, P2T improves effectiveness and efficiency over outcome-filtered SFT and its tool-error-masking variant. On SWE-bench Verified, it raises Pass@1 by up to 10.8 points while reducing per-instance inference cost by ~15%, with consistent gains on SWE-bench Lite. Size-matched ablations and qualitative analysis further isolate trajectory quality from data scale.

</details>


### [303] [Finding Missing Input Validation in TEEs via LLM-Assisted Symbolic Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22058)
*Chengyan Ma,Jieke Shi,Ruidong Han,Ye Liu,Yuqing Niu,David Lo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SymTEE提出了一种LLM辅助的符号执行框架，无需真实TEE环境即可检测TEE应用中的输入验证缺失漏洞，在26个漏洞上达到100%精确率和92.3%召回率，平均分析成本仅$0.05。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: TEE应用分析面临两大挑战：配置完整TEE构建和运行时环境成本高、复杂度大；硬件隔离导致的有限可观测性。现有方法难以大规模、低成本地进行安全分析。

Method: 1) 利用AST分析提取可能缺乏输入验证的TEE代码切片；2) 使用LLM（GPT-5）自动将提取的切片转换为KLEE兼容的harness程序，其中包含轻量级模拟执行环境，从而进行符号分析。

Result: 在26个漏洞（11个真实世界+15个合成）上，精确率100%，召回率92.3%，平均分析成本仅$0.05。

Conclusion: SymTEE开创了LLM辅助符号执行的新范式，LLM自主生成模拟环境，无需复杂配置即可实现自动化安全分析，为可信计算系统提供了更易用、可扩展的框架。

Abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) provide hardware-enforced isolation that protects sensitive code and data from untrusted software. Despite their strong security guarantees, analyzing TEE applications remains challenging due to the high cost and complexity of configuring complete TEE build and runtime environments, as well as the limited observability imposed by hardware isolation. This paper presents SymTEE, a novel large language model (LLM)-assisted symbolic execution framework for detecting missing input validation issues in TEE applications without requiring real TEE setups. SymTEE begins by leveraging Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) analysis to extract TEE code slices that may lack sufficient input validation, and then employs an LLM (GPT-5 in our case) to automatically convert the extracted slices into KLEE-compatible harness programs containing lightweight mock execution environments for symbolic analysis. Evaluations on 26 vulnerabilities (11 real-world and 15 synthetic) show that SymTEE achieves 100% precision and 92.3% recall in detecting missing input validation vulnerabilities while incurring an average analysis cost of only $0.05. These results demonstrate the effectiveness and practicality of SymTEE's pioneering paradigm of LLM-assisted symbolic execution, where LLMs autonomously generate mock environments to enable automated security analysis without complex setup, providing a more accessible and scalable framework for trusted computing systems.

</details>


### [304] [Automated Repair of TEE Partitioning Issues via DSL-Guided and LLM-Assisted Patching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22087)
*Chengyan Ma,Jieke Shi,Ruidong Han,Ye Liu,Feng Li,Yuqing Niu,David Lo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出TEERepair框架，通过领域特定语言编码修复规则、利用大语言模型合成上下文感知补丁，并生成测试客户端验证修复，自动修复TEE应用中的不良分区问题，在基准测试中修复成功率达87.6%，并在真实项目中提交5个修复PR，其中2个已被合并。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: TEE应用通过SDK接口与不可信操作系统交互时，不当分区会导致数据泄露和代码注入等严重漏洞。现有工作仅关注静态分析检测，自动修复领域尚未被探索，且面临三大挑战：缺乏标准化安全开发指南、难以从底层C代码提取语义信息、缺少成熟的测试验证方法。

Method: 首先引入领域特定语言(DSL)对通用TEE安全模式进行编码，实例化为带有上下文变量占位符的补丁模板；然后利用大语言模型(LLM)推理代码语义并合成上下文感知补丁；最后生成测试客户端对修复进行验证。

Result: 在PartitioningE-Bench基准测试上，修复成功率达87.6%，显著优于基线方法；在真实TEE项目中提交5个修复PR，其中2个已被项目维护者确认并合并。

Conclusion: TEERepair能够有效自动修复TEE应用中的不良分区问题，结合DSL编码安全规则与LLM语义理解能力，在基准测试和真实项目中均表现出色，验证了该方法的实用性和有效性。

Abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) provide hardware-based isolation to protect sensitive data and computations from potentially compromised operating systems (OS). However, TEE applications inevitably interact with the untrusted OS through SDK interfaces, and improper partitioning can introduce severe vulnerabilities such as data leakage and code injection. While prior work has proposed static analysis tools to detect such issues, automated repair remains largely unexplored. This problem is particularly challenging due to three TEE-specific factors: the lack of standardized secure development guidelines, the difficulty of extracting semantic information from low-level C code, and the absence of mature testing and validation methods. In this work, we present TEERepair, a framework for automatically repairing bad partitioning issues in TEE applications. Our approach tackles the above challenges by introducing a domain-specific language (DSL) to encode repair rules that express and capture common TEE security patterns, which are instantiated as patch templates with placeholders for context-specific variables. We then leverage large language models (LLMs) to reason about code semantics and synthesize context-aware patches, and further generate test clients to validate the repairs. We evaluate TEERepair on the TEE Partitioning Errors Benchmark (PartitioningE-Bench), achieving a significantly higher repair success rate of 87.6% compared to baselines. Furthermore, applying TEERepair to real-world TEE projects, we submitted 5 repair pull requests, 2 of which have been confirmed and merged by project maintainers.

</details>


### [305] [SWE-Mutation: Can LLMs Generate Reliable Test Suites in Software Engineering?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22175)
*Yuxuan Sun,Yuze Zhao,Yufeng Wang,Yao Du,Zhiyuan Ma,Jinbo Wang,Mengdi Zhang,Kai Zhang,Zhenya Huang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SWE-Mutation基准，用于评估LLM生成的测试套件质量，通过引入系统性变异解决方案来“欺骗”测试套件。实验表明，即使DeepSeek-V3.1也仅达到10.20%的验证率和36.15%的检测率，揭示当前LLM生成可靠测试套件的能力严重不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量的测试套件在评估LLM的软件工程能力中至关重要，但由于人工标注成本高昂且LLM自动生成的测试套件过于浅层且缺乏判别力，高质量的测试套件长期难以获得。

Method: 提出SWE-Mutation基准，通过系统性引入变异解决方案来评估测试套件质量；同时提出一个基于智能体、语言无关的框架来自动生成复杂变异体。基准包含从800个原始实例衍生的2,636个变异变体，覆盖9种编程语言的多语言子集。

Result: 在7个LLM上的实验显示，DeepSeek-V3.1仅达到10.20%的验证率和36.15%的检测率；提出的智能体变异策略相比传统方法将平均检测率从71.04%降至39.81%，更具真实性。

Conclusion: 当前LLM生成可靠且具有判别力的测试套件的能力存在持续缺陷，SWE-Mutation可作为评估和改进测试套件质量的重要基准。

Abstract: Evaluating software engineering capabilities has become a core component of modern large language models (LLMs); however, the key bottleneck hindering further scaling lies not in the scarcity of high-quality solutions, but in the lack of high-quality test suites. Test suites are indispensable both for synthesizing program repair trajectories and for providing precise feedback signals in reinforcement learning. Unfortunately, due to the high cost and difficulty of annotation, high-quality test suites have long been hard to obtain, while those automatically generated by LLMs tend to be superficial and lack sufficient discriminative power. As a first step toward constructing high-quality test suites, we introduce SWE-Mutation, a benchmark for evaluating LLM-generated test suites. The benchmark characterizes test suites by introducing systematically mutated solutions that attempt to ``fool'' the test suites and pass validation. We further propose an agentic, language-agnostic framework for automatically generating complex mutants. Our benchmark consists of 2,636 mutated variants derived from 800 original instances and includes a multilingual subset spanning nine programming languages. Experiments on seven LLMs reveal that even DeepSeek-V3.1 achieves only 10.20% verification and 36.15% detection rates, highlighting the inadequacy of current LLMs. Additionally, our agentic mutation strategy enhances realism, reducing average detection rates from 71.04% to 39.81% compared to conventional methods. These findings expose persistent deficiencies in the ability of current LLMs to generate reliable and discriminative test suites.

</details>


### [306] [An Architecture for Decentralised Deployment and Operation of Blockchain Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22239)
*Fabian Stiehle,Kirill Inozemtsev,Ingo Weber*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合DAO治理与DevOps实践的区块链架构，通过扩展注册模式支持确定性部署，并实现了去中心化的部署框架，包含CI/CD流水线、用户界面和版本控制集成，最终以开源实现验证了方案的可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有区块链dApp开发依赖集中式DevOps基础设施（由单一实体控制），缺乏去中心化的治理架构；DAO虽能解决治理问题，但与合同发现、升级等现有模式的集成复杂，且缺乏统一的设计范式。

Method: 1. 集成DAO治理与DevOps最佳实践，设计治理无关的通用架构；2. 扩展经典注册模式，支持确定性部署；3. 构建去中心化部署框架，包含集成流水线、部署流水线、用户界面及版本控制；4. 各参与方在交互前自行实现并验证测试。

Result: 提供了开源参考实现，并进行了全面评估；所提架构可作为未来集成的参考，开源框架降低了实际采纳该流程的复杂度。

Conclusion: 该架构有效弥合了去中心化治理与DevOps实践之间的鸿沟，为区块链应用提供了一种可复用的、治理不可知的设计参考，同时推动了开源生态建设。

Abstract: Blockchains and distributed ledger technologies allow the operation of manifold decentralised applications (dApps). Such applications are based on smart contracts, a programmable abstraction that is executed in a decentralised manner. To ensure the correctness of smart contracts, blockchain application developers rely on DevOps practices such as automated testing and continuous integration and deployment. However, such infrastructure is often controlled by single entities. For larger blockchain applications, this issue is resolved by relying on concepts of Decentralised Autonomous Organisations (DAOs), which allow proposals to be autonomously executed once they reach a pre-defined quorum. Such a governance architecture is complex and requires integration with existing patterns for contract discovery and upgradeability. In this paper we integrate these concepts considering DevOps best-practices into a novel architecture that remains agnostic to different governance and upgrade implementations. We extend the known registry pattern to support deterministic deployments and present a decentralised deployment framework, including integration and deployment pipelines, user-interfaces, and version control integration. In our approach, each party implements and verifies their own tests before engaging in the use of a (newly deployed) smart contract. We provide a reference implementation, available as open-source, and evaluate the proposal thoroughly. Our architecture can serve as a reference for future integrations, while our open-source framework is aimed at reducing the complexity of adopting such a process in practice.

</details>


### [307] [At What Cost? Software Developers' Well-Being in the Age of GenAI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22349)
*Mariam Guizani,Maduka Subasinghage,Sherlock A. Licorish,Sofia Ouhbi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文指出，生成式人工智能（GenAI）正快速重塑软件开发，但过度关注生产力和性能优化可能忽视开发者福祉。GenAI工具可能加重认知负荷、引入新型监督劳动、加剧产出压力，导致压力、倦怠和工作生活失衡。同时，GenAI也在改变职业规范、加剧不平等。本文呼吁将GenAI研究从狭隘绩效指标转向关注人类体验、社会情境和可持续生产力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前GenAI研究过度聚焦于生产力和性能提升，忽略了其对开发者福祉（认知负荷、压力、倦怠、工作生活平衡）及职业规范、公平性的负面影响，亟需研究转向。

Method: 本文为立场论文（position paper），提出一个理论框架，主张将研究从狭隘的绩效指标扩展到人类体验、社会情境和可持续生产力。

Result: 指出GenAI工具的三类风险：认知负荷与监督劳动增加、产出期望与节奏压力、职业规范改变与不平等加深。

Conclusion: 呼吁重新定向GenAI在软件开发中的研究议程，推动以人为中心、关注社会情境和可持续生产力的研究方向。

Abstract: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) is rapidly reshaping software development, with growing emphasis on accelerating productivity and optimizing performance. However, excessive focus on such dimensions risks overlooking the critical implications for developer well-being. GenAI tools can amplify cognitive load, introduce new forms of oversight labor, and escalate expectations around output and pace, contributing to stress, burnout, and diminished work-life balance. The GenAI movement is also transforming professional norms, altering career entry points, demanding continuous adaptation, and deepening inequalities in access and support. This position paper calls for a reorientation of the GenAI research agenda in software development and proposes a theoretical framework to move beyond narrow performance metrics toward investigations that also center on human experience, social context, and sustainable productivity.

</details>


### [308] ["Refactoring Runaway": Understanding and Mitigating Tangled Refactorings in Coding Agents for Issue Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22526)
*Zhao Tian,Zifan Zhang,Tao Xiao,Dong Wang,Masanari Kondo,Junjie Chen,Yasutaka Kamei*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了编码智能体在软件问题解决中引入的缠结重构行为。通过对3,691个补丁的分析发现，智能体比人类开发者更少且强度更低地引入缠结重构，但重构类型更多样。缠结重构与可编译性下降显著相关，但与功能正确性无显著关联。基于此，作者提出了一种重构感知优化方法，将可编译性从19.34%提升至38.33%，并额外解决了2.79%之前未解决的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实中的软件问题修复经常伴随重构操作（缠结重构），而基于LLM的编码智能体可能从训练数据中继承了这种行为。然而，这种行为对补丁质量的影响尚未被系统研究。

Method: 在Multi-SWE-bench上，对3个智能体框架+12种LLM生成的3,691个有效补丁进行实证分析，比较智能体与人类开发者的缠结重构频率、强度、多样性，并通过逻辑回归分析缠结重构与可编译性、功能正确性的关系。最后提出重构感知优化方法。

Result: 编码智能体缠结重构频率（21.43% vs 36.72%）和强度（0.66 vs 1.75）均低于人类，但重构类型更多样。逻辑回归显示缠结重构与可编译性下降显著相关，与功能正确性无关。提出的方法将可编译性从19.34%提升到38.33%，额外解决2.79%问题。

Conclusion: 这是首个系统研究智能体代码修复中缠结重构行为的工作，揭示了智能体虽然重构频率更低但类型更丰富的现象，并证明了缠结重构主要影响可编译性而非功能正确性。提出的优化方法有效提升了补丁质量。

Abstract: Recent advances in coding agents have shown remarkable progress in software issue resolution. In practice, real-world issues are typically bug fixes or feature requests in which human developers naturally incorporate refactoring as part of the resolution process, resulting in tangled refactoring. Since LLMs are trained on large-scale open-source repositories, coding agents may inherit such behaviors. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study on Multi-SWE-bench, analyzing 3,691 valid patches generated by three agent frameworks with 12 LLMs. We find that coding agents introduce tangled refactorings less frequently (21.43% vs. 36.72%) and with lower intensity (0.66 vs. 1.75) than human developers, although they exhibit a broader diversity of refactoring types. Logistic regression analysis further shows that tangled refactorings are strongly associated with reduced compilability, while exhibiting no significant association with functional correctness. Based on these findings, we propose a refactoring-aware refinement approach that assesses the necessity and safety of tangled refactorings and selectively removes or repairs problematic operations. Our approach improves compilability from 19.34% to 38.33%, and additionally resolves 2.79% previously unresolved issues. Overall, this work presents the first step towards understanding tangled refactoring practices in agentic issue resolution and opens up avenues for future work.

</details>


### [309] [Why Are Agentic Pull Requests Merged or Rejected? An Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22534)
*Sien Reeve O. Peralta,Fumika Hoshi,Hironori Washizaki,Naoyasu Ubayashi,Inase Kondo,Yoshiki Higo,Hiroki Mukai,Norihiro Yoshida,Kazuki Kusama,Hidetake Tanaka,Youmei Fan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究发现，仅通过合并/拒绝结果判断AI编码代理性能不可靠。对11,048个Agentic PR分析后，仅35.7%被拒PR反映代理失败，31.2%因工作流限制，33.1%无决策理由。合并PR中15.4%需审阅者介入。不同代理行为模式存在系统性差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI编码代理的性能评估主要依赖合并或拒绝的二元结果标签，但作者认为这些标签无法可靠反映代理能力，因为它们没有考虑审阅交互过程。作者希望通过决策导向分析，检验这一假设。

Method: 对11,048个已关闭的Agentic PR进行决策导向分析，筛选出9,799个经人类审阅的PR，并人工检查717个代表性案例，从交互痕迹中恢复决策依据。

Result: 仅35.7%的被拒PR反映明确的代理失败，31.2%由工作流限制导致，33.1%缺乏可观察的决策依据。合并PR中15.4%需要审阅者的反馈或直接提交介入，5.5%无可见交互痕迹。不同代理（Copilot、Devin、Codex、Cursor）行为模式存在系统性差异。

Conclusion: 拒绝仅凭PR结果来捕捉代理性能的假设，论证了需要基于审阅行为的、考虑交互的评估方法。

Abstract: AI coding agents increasingly submit pull requests (Agentic-PRs) to open-source repositories, yet their performance is commonly assessed using merge and rejection outcomes alone. We hypothesized that these outcome labels do not reliably reflect agent capability without considering review interactions. To test this, we conducted a decision-oriented analysis of 11,048 closed Agentic Pull Requests, refined to 9,799 human-reviewed PRs, and manually inspected 717 representative cases to recover decision rationale from interaction artifacts. We found that rejection outcomes substantially overstate agent error: only 35.7% of rejected PRs reflected clear agentic failures, while 31.2% were driven by workflow constraints and 33.1% lacked observable decision rationale. Among merged PRs, 15.4% required explicit reviewer involvement through feedback or direct commits, and 5.5% showed no visible interaction trace. We further observed systematic differences across agents, with Copilot and Devin more often embedded in reviewer-mediated workflows, while Codex and Cursor PRs were typically merged with minimal interaction. These results reject the assumption that PR outcomes alone capture agent performance and demonstrate the need for interaction-aware evaluation grounded in review behavior.

</details>


### [310] [Contractual Skills: A GovernSpec Design Framework for Enterprise AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22634)
*Ting Liu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出"契约技能"(Contractual Skills)框架，通过GovernSpec设计理念组织SKILL.md文件为可读任务契约，在保持轻量技能发现和渐进加载的同时，使目标、输入边界、权限、证据要求、输出契约、质量标准、验证步骤、人工审批点和交接规则可审查。实验表明契约技能在所有测试模型上优于无技能和最小技能基线，但与信息丰富的扩展技能相比提升有限，主要改善可检查性和可维护性而非生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业环境中技能(skills)需要表达的内容远超任务指导，必须使目标、输入边界、权限、证据要求、输出契约、质量标准、验证步骤、人工审批点和交接规则可审查(inspectable)。现有技能封装方式缺乏对这些治理要素的显式表达机制。

Method: 提出Contractual Skills框架，基于GovernSpec设计理念组织SKILL.md文件；通过两个离线实验评估：1)文本生成实验(3个企业技能、15个合成任务、4种指令条件、8个生成模型，共960个输出和1680条交叉评判记录)；2)工具调用挑战(8个模型、192个模拟工具调用记录)。

Result: 契约技能在所有测试模型上优于无技能和最小技能基线；相对信息丰富的扩展技能提升有限且混合；契约技能减少了高风险工具尝试，但模型差异仍然存在，运行时工具护栏仍必不可少。

Conclusion: 契约技能应被理解为一种治理层(governance layer)，使任务意图、边界和验收标准显式化，而非独立的安防机制。

Abstract: Skills are increasingly used to package agent instructions, workflows, scripts, and reference materials. In enterprise settings, however, skills often need to express more than task guidance: they must make goals, input boundaries, permissions, evidence requirements, output contracts, quality criteria, verification steps, human approval points, and handoff rules inspectable. This paper proposes contractual skills, a GovernSpec-inspired design framework for organizing SKILL.md files as readable task contracts while preserving lightweight skill discovery and progressive loading. The framework clarifies the boundary between contractual skills, GovernSpec YAML contracts, Model Context Protocol surfaces, tool adapters, runtime guardrails, tracing, and evaluation systems.
  We evaluate the framework with two offline experiments. A text-generation study covers three enterprise skills, fifteen synthetic tasks, four instruction conditions, and eight generation models, yielding 960 outputs and 1680 cross-judge score records. Contractual skills outperform no-skill and minimal-skill baselines on all tested models. Relative to information-rich plain expanded skills, the gains are small and mixed, suggesting that contractual fields mainly improve checkability and maintainability rather than raw generation quality. A tool-calling challenge covers eight models and 192 simulated tool-call records. Skills usually reduce high-risk tool attempts, but model differences remain and runtime tool guardrails are still required. The results suggest that contractual skills are best understood as a governance layer that makes task intent, boundaries, and acceptance criteria explicit, not as a standalone safety mechanism.

</details>


### [311] [FAME: Failure-Aware Mixture-of-Experts for Message-Level Log Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22779)
*Huanchi Wang,Zihang Huang,Yifang Tian,Kristina Dzeparoska,Hans-Arno Jacobsen,Alberto Leon-Garcia*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: FAME是一个标签高效的消息级日志异常检测框架，使用Mixture-of-Experts方法，仅需每模板K=100条标注即可达到高F1分数（BGL:98.16, Thunderbird:99.95），且能检测86.3%的未见EventID异常。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有日志异常检测多在会话或窗口粒度进行，导致运维人员需检查大量常规日志。消息级检测虽粒度更细，但面临同一模板既含正常也含异常、异常来源异构、行级标注成本高等挑战。LLM虽能理解日志语义，但对每条日志实时应用成本过高。

Method: FAME框架：1) 离线阶段使用LLM一次分析，每模板最多标注K条标签；2) LLM提出模板到故障域的划分方案，经验证步骤确认；3) 训练轻量级路由器和领域专家模型，部署于本地；4) 在线推理时输出异常预测和故障域标签。

Result: 在BGL数据集上，K=100时F1=98.16（标注量减少76倍），检测86.3%的未见EventID异常；在Thunderbird上F1=99.95，召回率完美。

Conclusion: FAME通过离线LLM指导的MoE框架，实现了高效的消息级异常检测，大幅降低标注成本，同时具备泛化到未知异常类型的能力。

Abstract: Production systems generate millions of log lines daily, yet most anomaly detectors operate at the session or window-level, flagging groups of lines rather than identifying the specific message responsible. This coarse granularity forces operators to inspect many routine lines per alert. Message-level detection offers finer granularity, but remains challenging. A single event template may correspond to both normal and anomalous messages, failures arise from heterogeneous subsystems, and line-level labeling at scale is impractical. Although large language models (LLMs) can reason over log semantics, applying them to every line is too costly for continuous monitoring. We present FAME (Failure-Aware Mixture-of-Experts), a label-efficient message-level mixture-of-experts framework that uses an LLM only once offline. We annotate at most K labeled lines per template to derive binary normal/anomaly indicators and representative examples. The LLM proposes a partition of templates into failure domains, and a certification step validates the proposal before training. FAME trains a lightweight router and domain experts that run on-premise and output anomaly predictions and failure-domain labels. On BGL, FAME achieves F1 = 98.16 at K = 100 reducing annotation effort by 76x and detects 86.3% of anomalies from unseen EventIDs. On Thunderbird, FAME reaches F1 = 99.95 with perfect recall.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [312] [Dropout Universality: Scaling Laws and Optimal Scheduling at the Edge-of-Chaos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21648)
*Lucas Fernandez Sarmiento*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了Dropout的均场理论，将其视为对临界信号传播的微扰，揭示了平滑激活与ReLU类激活属于不同普适类，并推导出缩放律，最终实现了固定预算下的饱和Dropout配置及前加载调度策略，显著降低测试损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解Dropout对深度网络中信号传播与信息深度的影响机制，建立理论框架来解释Dropout为何及如何影响网络训练与泛化。

Method: 采用均场理论将Dropout建模为对混沌边缘临界信号传播的微扰，分析相关性映射的解析结构，区分平滑激活与分段线性激活的普适类，并推导临界与交叉缩放律。

Result: 发现Dropout使完美对齐不动点偏移，信息传播深度有限化；平滑与ReLU激活属于不同普适类，具有不同临界指数；提出饱和Dropout配置与前加载调度，在无额外计算成本下显著降低测试损失。

Conclusion: Dropout的效应可用临界现象理论刻画，不同激活函数属于不同普适类；基于理论指导的调度策略可有效提升泛化性能，且方法可扩展到CNN/ResNet架构。

Abstract: We develop a mean-field theory of dropout as a perturbation of critical signal propagation at the edge of chaos. Dropout shifts the perfect-alignment fixed point, making the depth scale for information propagation finite even at critical initialization. We derive critical and crossover scaling laws for correlation decay and establish that smooth activations and kinked, ReLU-like activations constitute distinct universality classes, with different critical exponents and a universal two-parameter scaling collapse in detuning and dropout strength. The distinction traces to the analytic structure of the correlation map: smooth activations admit a Taylor expansion near perfect alignment, while kinked activations develop a branch point with universal non-analyticity. As a corollary, the framework yields saturated dropout profiles under fixed budget; a rank-flow tie-breaker then selects front-loaded schedules, substantially reducing held-out test loss at no extra computational cost, with accuracy gains as a consistent secondary effect. We test the predictions in MLPs and Vision Transformers and discuss CNN/ResNet extensions.

</details>


### [313] [Temporal Contrastive Transformer for Financial Crime Detection: Self-Supervised Sequence Embeddings via Predictive Contrastive Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21490)
*Danny Butvinik,Yonit Marcus,Nitzan Tal,Gabrielle Azoulay*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了 Temporal Contrastive Transformer (TCT)，一种自监督对比学习框架，用于从金融交易序列中学习行为表征。实验表明，TCT 嵌入单独使用有一定效果（AUC 0.8644），但与手工特征结合时未带来额外提升（AUC 0.9205 vs 0.9245），说明学习到的表征与现有特征存在重叠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 金融欺诈检测中，传统方法依赖大量领域特征工程，成本高且泛化能力有限。作者希望利用自监督对比学习从交易序列中自动捕捉时序行为模式，减少对人工特征工程的依赖。

Method: 提出 Temporal Contrastive Transformer (TCT)，采用 Transformer 架构结合对比学习目标进行自监督预训练，从金融交易序列中学习时序行为嵌入。下游任务使用梯度提升分类器进行评估。

Result: TCT 嵌入单独使用达到 AUC 0.8644；与领域工程特征结合后 AUC 为 0.9205，略低于纯手工特征的基线 0.9245，未带来显著提升。

Conclusion: TCT 能够自动捕获有意义的时序行为信号，但当前在强特征工程基线面前尚未展现出附加价值。尽管如此，该方向有望减少对人工特征工程的依赖，值得进一步研究架构、目标和集成策略。

Abstract: We introduce the Temporal Contrastive Transformer (TCT), a representation learning framework designed to capture contextual temporal dynamics in sequences of financial transactions. The model is trained using a self-supervised contrastive objective to produce embeddings that encode behavioral patterns over time, with the goal of supporting downstream fraud detection tasks. We evaluate TCT in a realistic setting by using the learned embeddings as input features to a gradient boosting classifier. Experimental results show that embeddings alone achieve meaningful predictive performance (AUC 0.8644), indicating that the model captures non-trivial temporal structure. However, when combined with domain-engineered features, no measurable improvement is observed over the baseline (AUC 0.9205 vs. 0.9245), suggesting that the learned representations largely overlap with existing feature abstractions. These findings position TCT as a promising representation learning approach that captures relevant behavioral signal, while highlighting the challenges of achieving additive value over strong domain features. The results reflect an intermediate stage in the development of temporal representation learning for financial crime detection and motivate further research on model architecture, training objectives, and integration strategies. At this early stage, achieving performance comparable to a strong feature-engineered baseline is itself a meaningful outcome, indicating that learned representations approximate domain-specific features without manual engineering. While not yet production-ready, these results point to a promising direction for reducing reliance on feature engineering in financial crime detection.

</details>


### [314] [Cross-Species RSA Reveals Conserved Early Visual Alignment but Divergent Higher-Area Rankings Across Human fMRI and Macaque Electrophysiology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22401)
*Nils Leutenegger*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究将五种学习规则（BP、FA、PC、STDP及随机权重基线）从人类扩展到猕猴，发现早期视觉皮层（V1/V2）的脑对齐性跨物种稳健（STDP和PC表现最优），但高级视觉区（IT）的对齐性受模型容量和训练数据影响更大，而学习规则的排序在物种间无显著相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究学习规则与脑对齐之间的关系是否具有跨物种的普遍性，验证在人类fMRI中发现的规律能否推广到猕猴电生理数据。

Method: 使用与人类研究相同的模型权重，将五种学习规则（BP、FA、PC、STDP、随机基线）与猕猴电生理数据（MajajHong2015 V4/IT和FreemanZiemba2013 V1/V2）进行表征相似性分析（RSA），并对比跨物种结果。

Result: （1）所有模型在猕猴早期视觉皮层（V1/V2）的对齐性（rho=0.15-0.30）高于人类fMRI（rho=0.01-0.08）；（2）STDP和PC在猕猴V1/V2表现最优（rho~0.30和0.28）；（3）IT层学习规则排序跨物种无显著相关（Kendall's tau=0.00, p=1.00）；（4）预训练ResNet-50在猕猴IT层（rho=0.25）远超自定义CNN（rho=0.07-0.14）。

Conclusion: 早期视觉对齐性跨物种稳健，而高级视觉区对齐性主要受模型容量和训练数据影响，学习规则的作用有限。

Abstract: Does the relationship between learning rules and brain alignment generalize across species? We extend our prior finding that untrained CNNs match backpropagation at human V1 by testing the same five learning rules against macaque electrophysiology. The rules are backpropagation (BP), feedback alignment (FA), predictive coding (PC), spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP), and an untrained random-weights baseline. The macaque data come from two datasets: MajajHong2015 (V4/IT, 3,200 stimulus presentations, 88/168 neurons) and FreemanZiemba2013 (V1/V2, 135 stimuli, 102/103 neurons). Using RSA with identical model weights from our human study, we find: (1) all models achieve higher alignment with macaque early visual cortex (rho = 0.15-0.30 at V1/V2) than with human fMRI (rho = 0.01-0.08), consistent with the higher signal-to-noise ratio of electrophysiology; (2) STDP and PC produce the highest macaque V1/V2 alignment (rho ~ 0.30 and 0.28), consistent with their leading position among trained rules in human V1; (3) at IT, learning rule rankings show no detectable correlation across species (Kendall's tau = 0.00, p = 1.00), though this null result is expected given that n = 5 provides power only at tau = +/-1.0, and is further confounded by stimulus set differences; (4) a pretrained ResNet-50 (ImageNet) achieves rho = 0.25 at macaque IT, substantially above all custom CNN conditions (rho = 0.07-0.14), suggesting IT alignment is limited by model capacity and training data rather than by the learning rule. Noise ceilings, multi-seed variability (5 seeds), and a stimulus-control analysis are reported. These results demonstrate that early visual alignment is robust across species, while higher-area alignment is modulated by model capacity and stimulus domain.

</details>


### [315] [Teaching Language Models to Forecast Research Success Through Comparative Idea Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21491)
*Srujan P Mule,Aniketh Garikaparthi,Manasi Patwardhan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究语言模型能否在实验前预测科研想法的优劣。通过构建11,488对想法数据集，发现小模型经SFT（77.1%）和RLVR（71.35%）训练后表现显著提升，甚至超越GPT-5（61.1%），证明小模型可作为高效的客观验证器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着语言模型自动化科研能力提升，评估和筛选海量AI生成想法成为新瓶颈。现有方法依赖大量实验验证，成本高昂。因此，作者探索是否能让语言模型在实验前预测想法的实证成功，从而加速自主科学发现。

Method: ①构建基于PapersWithCode的11,488对想法数据集，每对对应基准任务中两个候选想法；②使用监督微调（SFT）训练8B小模型；③引入基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR），将评估转化为推理任务，训练模型发现潜在推理路径。

Result: ①原始8B模型准确率仅30%；②SFT后提升至77.1%，超越GPT-5的61.1%；③RLVR达到71.35%并提供可解释推理；④模型对表面启发式具有鲁棒性，在跨域时间分割测试和独立构建数据集上均表现良好。

Conclusion: 计算高效的小语言模型可以成为有效、客观的科研想法验证器，为自主科学发现提供可扩展的路径。

Abstract: As language models accelerate scientific research by automating hypothesis generation and implementation, a new bottleneck emerges: evaluating and filtering hundreds of AI-generated ideas without exhaustive experimentation. We ask whether LMs can learn to forecast the empirical success of research ideas before any experiments are run. We study comparative empirical forecasting: given a benchmark-specific research goal and two candidate ideas, predict which will achieve better benchmark performance. We construct a dataset of 11,488 idea pairs grounded in objective outcomes from PapersWithCode. While off-the-shelf 8B-parameter models struggle (30% acc.), SFT dramatically boosts performance to 77.1%, outperforming GPT-5 (61.1%). By framing evaluation as a reasoning task via Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), we train models to discover latent reasoning paths, achieving 71.35% acc. with interpretable justifications. Through additional ablations and out-of-distribution tests, we show robustness to surface-level heuristics and transfer to both a cross-domain time-split test set and an independently constructed test set. Our results demonstrate that compute-efficient small language models can serve as effective, objective verifiers, offering a scalable path for autonomous scientific discovery.

</details>


### [316] [Vector Policy Optimization: Training for Diversity Improves Test-Time Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22817)
*Ryan Bahlous-Boldi,Isha Puri,Idan Shenfeld,Akarsh Kumar,Mehul Damani,Sebastian Risi,Omar Khattab,Zhang-Wei Hong,Pulkit Agrawal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出向量策略优化（VPO），通过训练LLM输出多样化解决方案以适配不同奖励函数，在推理时搜索（如AlphaEvolve）中显著优于传统标量RL方法，尤其在进化搜索中解决了GRPO无法解决的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM后训练使用标量奖励优化，导致输出分布低熵，缺乏多样性，无法适应推理时搜索所需的多样化奖励函数和探索需求。

Method: 提出VPO算法，将GRPO的优势估计器替换为向量版本，利用实践中常见的向量奖励（如代码生成的逐测试用例正确性、多种用户画像），训练模型输出一组在不同向量奖励权衡上专门化的解决方案。

Result: 在四个任务上，VPO在测试时搜索指标（pass@k、best@k）上匹配或超越最强标量RL基线，搜索预算越大优势越明显。在进化搜索中，VPO能解决GRPO完全无法解决的问题。

Conclusion: 随着测试时搜索成为标准实践，优化多样性可能应成为默认的后训练目标。

Abstract: Language models must now generalize out of the box to novel environments and work inside inference-scaling search procedures, such as AlphaEvolve, that select rollouts with a variety of task-specific reward functions. Unfortunately, the standard paradigm of LLM post-training optimizes a pre-specified scalar reward, often leading current LLMs to produce low-entropy response distributions and thus to struggle at displaying the diversity that inference-time search will require. We propose Vector Policy Optimization (VPO), an RL algorithm that explicitly trains policies to anticipate diverse downstream reward functions and to produce diverse solutions. VPO exploits that rewards are often vector-valued in practice, like per-test-case correctness in code generation or, say, multiple different user personas or reward models. VPO is essentially a drop-in replacement for the GRPO advantage estimator, but it trains the LLM to output a set of solutions where individual solutions specialize to different trade-offs in the vector reward space. Across four tasks, VPO matches or beats the strongest scalar RL baselines on test-time search (e.g. pass@k and best@k), with the gap widening as the search budget grows. For evolutionary search, VPO models unlock problems that GRPO models cannot solve at all. As test-time search becomes more standardized, optimizing for diversity may need to become the default post-training objective.

</details>


### [317] [The Attribution Impossibility: No Feature Ranking Is Faithful, Stable, and Complete Under Collinearity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21492)
*Drake Caraker,Bryan Arnold,David Rhoads*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明了一项不可能性定理：当特征存在共线性时，没有任何特征归因排序能同时满足忠实性、稳定性和完备性。通过DASH（多样化SHAP聚合）集成方法解决此问题，并用Lean 4进行了305条定理的机械验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示特征共线性下归因排序的根本性局限，证明忠实性、稳定性和完备性三者不可兼得，并对此不可能性进行定量刻画。

Method: 通过理论证明（归因设计空间二分定理）、四类模型定量分析（梯度提升、Lasso、随机森林等），提出DASH集成方法（达到Cramér-Rao方差下界），并在77个公开数据集上实证检验，最终用Lean 4进行305条定理的形式化验证。

Result: 归因方法被严格分为两类：忠实-完备方法（不稳定，排序翻转率高达50%）和集成方法如DASH（稳定，对称特征报告平局）；77个数据集中68%存在归因不稳定性；梯度提升的归因比率以1/(1-ρ²)发散，Lasso无限大，随机森林收敛。

Conclusion: 在可解释AI领域首次完成了不可能性的形式化验证（Lean 4，305条定理，0个sorry），并指出其对公平性审计（基于SHAP的代理歧视审计在共线性下不可靠）等实践具有重要影响。

Abstract: No feature ranking can be simultaneously faithful, stable, and complete when features are collinear. For collinear pairs, ranking reduces to a coin flip. We prove this impossibility, quantify it for four model classes, resolve it via ensemble averaging (DASH), and machine-verify it with 305 Lean 4 theorems. We characterize the complete attribution design space: exactly two families of methods exist -- faithful-complete methods (unstable, with rankings that flip up to 50% of the time) and ensemble methods like DASH (stable, reporting ties for symmetric features) -- and no method lies outside this dichotomy. The impossibility is quantitative: the attribution ratio diverges as 1/(1-rho^2) for gradient boosting, is infinite for Lasso, and converges for random forests. DASH (Diversified Aggregation of SHAP) is provably Pareto-optimal among unbiased aggregations, achieving the Cramer-Rao variance bound with a tight ensemble size formula. In a survey of 77 public datasets, 68% exhibit attribution instability. Switching to conditional SHAP does not escape the impossibility when features have equal causal effects. The framework includes practical diagnostics -- a Z-test workflow and single-model screening tool -- and has direct consequences for fairness auditing: SHAP-based proxy discrimination audits are provably unreliable under collinearity. The design space theorem, diagnostics, and impossibility are mechanically verified in Lean 4 (305 theorems from 16 axioms, 0 sorry) -- to our knowledge, the first formally verified impossibility in explainable AI.

</details>


### [318] [Don't Collapse Your Features: Why CenterLoss Hurts OOD Detection and Multi-Scale Mahalanobis Wins](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21493)
*Rahul D Ray*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GOEN方法，通过多尺度特征、L2归一化、马氏距离和校准头实现高效OOD检测，并发现CenterLoss正则化器虽提升分类准确率但会损害OOD检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OOD检测方法使用的特征表示仅针对分类准确率优化，忽视了认知不确定性（epistemic uncertainty）的独特需求，因此需要专门为不确定性感知设计特征表示。

Method: GOEN (Geometry-Optimised Epistemic Network): 多尺度特征提取 + L2归一化 + 马氏距离（Mahalanobis distance） + 使用真实难OOD样本训练的校准头（calibration head）。通过系统消融实验揭示CenterLoss的影响。

Result: GOEN-NoCenterLoss变体在CIFAR-10上达到OOD AUROC 0.9483，超越深度集成（0.8827）、KNN（0.8967）、ODIN（0.8870）等基线。加入CenterLoss后AUROC从0.9483降至0.9366。训练时间不到20分钟（单GPU）。

Conclusion: 更好的分类几何并不自动带来更好的认知不确定性。过紧的特征簇会压缩类间边界、扭曲协方差结构，反而损害OOD检测。

Abstract: The ability to detect out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs is fundamental to safe deployment of machine learning systems. Yet, current methods often rely on feature representations that are optimised solely for classification accuracy, neglecting the distinct requirements of epistemic uncertainty. We introduce GOEN (Geometry-Optimised Epistemic Network), a simple pipeline that combines multi-scale features, L2 normalisation, Mahalanobis distance, and a calibration head trained with real hard OOD examples. Through systematic ablation we uncover a counter-intuitive finding: CenterLoss, a popular regulariser for feature compactness, significantly degrades OOD detection performance, reducing average OOD AUROC from 0.9483 to 0.9366 despite improving classification accuracy. The best variant, GOEN-NoCenterLoss, achieves an average OOD AUROC of 0.9483, surpassing all baselines including deep ensembles (0.8827), KNN (0.8967), and ODIN (0.8870) on CIFAR-10 benchmarks, while maintaining competitive in-distribution accuracy. Our results challenge the prevailing assumption that better classification geometry automatically leads to better epistemic uncertainty. Instead, we show that overly tight feature clusters compress inter-class margins and distort the covariance structure needed for effective OOD detection. GOEN is efficient, training in under 20 minutes on a single GPU, and provides a practical blueprint for building AI systems that reliably recognise their own limitations.

</details>


### [319] [Double descent for least-squares interpolation on contaminated data: A simulation study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21494)
*Tino Werner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在含污染数据的线性回归中，过参数化模型是否会出现"双重下降"现象。结果表明，高度非鲁棒的最小二乘插值估计器在高度过参数化时确实表现出双重下降，其泛化性能甚至超越鲁棒替代方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究在训练数据受污染（存在异常值）的情况下，过参数化模型是否仍能展现出"双重下降"这一反直觉的泛化现象，并比较鲁棒与非鲁棒估计器在此场景下的表现。

Method: 在含污染数据的线性回归框架下，对比高度非鲁棒的最小二乘插值估计器与多种鲁棒替代估计器在不同过参数化程度下的泛化性能，观察是否存在双重下降现象。

Result: 高度过参数化条件下，最小二乘插值估计器确实展现出双重下降现象，其泛化性能甚至超过了鲁棒替代方法。

Conclusion: 过参数化可以弥补非鲁棒估计器在污染数据上的劣势，使简单的最小二乘插值法在充分过参数化时比专门的鲁棒方法表现更优。

Abstract: Overparametrized models can exhibit an excellent generalization performance, although they should be prone to overfitting according to classical statistical theory. The discovery of the "double descent", indicating that the generalization error decreases after a certain model complexity has been reached, opened a new line of research. Robust statistics considers statistical estimation on contaminated data, which, due to assumptions that do not hold on real data, let data points appear as outliers w.r.t. the assumed "ideal" distribution, potentially severely distorting any classical estimator. We address the question whether a double descent phenomenon can be observed in a linear regression setting with contaminated training data. We compare the performance of the highly non-robust least-squares interpolation estimator with several robust alternatives. It turns out that large overparametrization indeed allows for a double descent phenomenon, resulting in a very good generalization performance of the least-squares interpolator, surpassing that of the robust alternatives.

</details>


### [320] [HealthCraft: A Reinforcement Learning Safety Environment for Emergency Medicine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21496)
*Brandon Dent*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HealthCraft 是首个面向急诊医学场景的公开强化学习环境，基于 FHIR R4 构建，包含 195 个任务和 2,255 个二元评估标准（其中 515 个为安全关键）。在 Frontier 模型测试中，Claude Opus 4.6 的 Pass@1 为 24.8%，GPT-5.4 为 12.6%，但在多步骤工作流上性能崩溃接近零。环境、任务、评估标准均已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有静态医学问答基准无法捕捉急诊医学中的关键失败模式，如轨迹级安全崩溃、工具误用以及在持续临床压力下的投降行为。前沿语言模型被部署到临床工作流的速度快于安全评估基础设施的建设速度。

Method: 基于 Corecraft 改编，构建 FHIR R4 世界状态（14 种实体类型、3,987 个种子实体），暴露 24 个 MCP 工具，定义双层评估标准（违反安全关键标准则奖励归零）。发布 195 个任务、6 个类别，含 2,255 个二元标准（515 个安全关键），后加 10 个负类任务。使用确定性 LLM 评判器覆盖控制评估噪声，并搭建了 Megatron+SGLang+GRPO 训练循环框架。

Result: Claude Opus 4.6 Pass@1 24.8% [21.5-28.4]，安全失败率 27.5%；GPT-5.4 Pass@1 12.6% [10.2-15.6]，安全失败率 34.0%。多步骤工作流性能崩溃（Claude 1.0%，GPT-5.4 0.0%）。基础设施缺陷修复后模型排名发生变化，负类测试显示约束标准通过率为 0.929，奖励信号存在可博弈性。

Conclusion: 当前 Frontier 模型在急诊医学场景下表现严重不足，安全失败率高，复杂工作流性能接近零。基础设施保真度影响评估结果。现有奖励信号不宜直接用于训练。环境、任务、评估标准均已开源（Apache 2.0），训练奖励消融实验留作未来工作。

Abstract: Frontier language models are being deployed into clinical workflows faster than the infrastructure to evaluate them safely. Static medical-QA benchmarks miss the failure modes that matter in emergency medicine: trajectory-level safety collapse, tool misuse, and capitulation under sustained clinical pressure. We present HealthCraft, the first public reinforcement-learning environment that rewards trajectory-level safety under realistic emergency-medicine conditions, adapted from Corecraft. It is built on a FHIR R4 world state with 14 entity types and 3,987 seed entities, exposes 24 MCP tools, and defines a dual-layer rubric that zeroes reward whenever any safety-critical criterion is violated. We release 195 tasks across six categories, graded against 2,255 binary criteria (515 safety-critical); a post-hoc 10-task negative-class slate extends this to 205 tasks and 2,337 criteria. V8 results on two frontier models show Claude Opus 4.6 at Pass@1 24.8% [21.5-28.4] and GPT-5.4 at 12.6% [10.2-15.6], with safety-failure rates of 27.5% and 34.0%. On multi-step workflows - the closest proxy to real emergency care - performance collapses to near zero (Claude 1.0%, GPT-5.4 0.0%) despite partial competence on individual steps. Six infrastructure bugs fixed between pilots v2 and v8 re-ordered which model "looks stronger," evidence that infrastructure fidelity is part of the measurement. A deterministic LLM-judge overlay bounds evaluator noise, and a 60-run negative-class smoke pilot shows the reward signal is not drop-in training-safe: restraint criteria pass at 0.929 prevalence, a gameability an eval harness can tolerate but a training reward cannot. We scaffold coupling to a Megatron+SGLang+GRPO loop per Corecraft Section 5.2 and leave training-reward ablations as future work. Environment, tasks, rubrics, and harness are released under Apache 2.0.

</details>


### [321] [Predicting Performance of Symbolic and Prompt Programs with Examples](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21515)
*Chengqi Zheng,Keya Hu,Shuzhi Liu,Tao Wu,Kevin Ellis,Yewen Pu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究程序性能预测问题，通过伯努利模型和先验分布发现：符号程序（如Python）的表现为"全有或全无"（通过即可靠），而提示程序（LLM prompting）的先验分散且存在大量近似正确程序。基于此提出RAP方法，通过检索相似任务和提示程序构建近似先验来预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM prompting虽被广泛使用但不可靠——少量测试用例通过不代表部署时可靠。现有方法缺乏对提示程序性能的准确预测手段，需要一种能够基于有限测试样例预测程序在未见任务上表现的方法。

Method: 使用抛硬币模型（伯努利随机变量）建模程序执行结果，性能取决于执行观测结果和先验分布。通过大规模语料库编译经验先验，发现符号程序与提示程序先验分布的显著差异。基于此提出RAP方法，从现有语料库中检索相似任务和提示程序构建代理先验，用于性能预测。

Result: 1) 符号程序（Python）的表现为"全有或全无"先验；2) 提示程序具有分散先验，存在大量近似正确程序；3) RAP方法在性能预测上取得了良好效果；4) 这一差异解释了为何少量测试用例能验证符号程序但无法验证提示程序。

Conclusion: 程序类型（符号 vs 提示）的先验分布本质不同，决定了不同的验证策略。RAP通过检索构建代理先验的方法有效，为LLM提示程序的可靠性评估提供了新路径。

Abstract: LLM prompting is widely used for naturally stated tasks, yet it is unreliable it may succeed on a few test cases but fail at deployment time. We study performance prediction: given a program, either symbolic (e.g. Python) or a prompt executed on an LLM, and a few in-domain examples, predict its performance on unseen tasks from the same domain. We use a simple coin-flip model, treating each pass/fail program execution as a Bernoulli random variable, whose success probability is the programs unknown performance. In this model, performance depends entirely on: 1) the observed execution outcomes on test cases, and 2) a prior over performances. We compile empirical performance priors from a corpus of diverse programs and tasks, and find that performance for symbolic programs (e.g., Python) are all or nothing, while prompt programs have a diffuse prior with many nearly-correct programs. This difference explains why a few passing tests can certify symbolic programs but not prompt programs. Building on this insight, we develop RAP (Retrieved Approximate Prior), which retrieves similar tasks and prompt programs from an existing corpus to construct a proxy prior, which is then used to predict performance. We show RAP achieves solid performances.

</details>


### [322] [Harnesses for Inference-Time Alignment over Execution Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21516)
*Boyuan Wang,Bochao Li,Minghan Wang,Yuxin Tao,Fang Kong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从推理时轨迹对齐的角度研究LLM Agent的工程化框架（Harness）设计，将Harness分解为任务分解和引导执行两个机制，分析了粒度、重试预算和动作重加权对性能的影响，并揭示了过度分解、过度剪枝和幻觉执行等失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前Harness设计缺乏统一理论框架，更复杂的Harness并不总是更好，有时反而降低任务成功率，因此需要从理论上理解Harness设计如何影响LLM Agent的长期性能。

Method: 提出推理时轨迹对齐视角，将Harness分解为任务分解（结构化子目标）和引导执行（重塑局部动作分布）两个独立机制，通过量化工作流粒度、重试预算和动作重加权来分析性能极限，并通过合成实验和真实终端Agent基准验证。

Result: 发现过度分解、过度剪枝和幻觉执行是具体的失败模式；部分Harness（仅指定初始步骤，后续由Agent自主执行）比完整结构化工作流能达到更高通过率。

Conclusion: Harness设计不需要完全结构化，合理的部分设计反而更优，为实际Harness设计提供了理论指导和实用建议。

Abstract: Harness engineering has emerged as an important inference-time technique for large language model (LLM) agents, aiming to improve long-term performance through task decomposition and guided execution. However, more elaborate harnesses are not uniformly better: increasing decomposition or guidance can sometimes improve execution, but can also reduce final task success. We study harness design through the lens of inference-time trajectory alignment. This perspective separates harness into two mechanisms: task decomposition, which structures a task into sub-goals, and guided execution, which reshapes local action distributions during execution. This decomposition allows us to quantify how workflow granularity, retry budgets, and guidance-induced action reweighting shape the performance limits of harness design. It further reveals concrete failure modes, including over-decomposition, over-pruning, and hallucinated execution. We validate these predictions through controlled synthetic experiments and real terminal agent benchmarks. Inspired by the theory, we further show that effective harnesses can be partial: specifying only the initial steps and leaving the remaining execution to agent can achieve higher pass rate than fully structured workflows.

</details>


### [323] [A Reproducible Log-Driven AutoML Framework for Interpretable Pipeline Optimization in Healthcare Risk Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21528)
*Rui Huang,Lican Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出yvsoucom-iterkit，一个确定性、日志驱动的自动化机器学习框架，将管道优化编码为可追溯的日志实体。在Pima和Stroke数据集上对18,000+配置进行实验，发现搜索空间结构化且部分冗余，性能由少数关键组件决定。集成模型在Pima上Weighted-F1达0.89，Stroke上Weighted-F1达0.94，且跨种子鲁棒性优于SVM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有疾病风险预测面临特征异质、样本有限、类别不平衡等挑战，且AutoML管道优化缺乏可重复性和可解释性，难以分析组件贡献与交互作用。

Method: 提出yvsoucom-iterkit框架，将每个管道编码为可追溯的日志实体，支持组件归因、交互分析、相似度评估和跨种子鲁棒性分析。使用Random Forest重要性分析、RMS距离等度量进行组件级分析。

Result: Pima数据集关键驱动因素：数据增强(0.454)、模型选择(0.198)、不平衡处理(0.101)；Stroke数据集不平衡处理主导(0.406)。组件相似性分析发现高度冗余。集成模型Pima: Weighted-F1 0.89, Macro-F1 0.88；Stroke: Weighted-F1 0.94, Macro-F1 0.67。集成模型跨种子变异系数0.023-0.026，优于SVM。

Conclusion: 有效的AutoML优化可聚焦于少数高影响力组件；搜索空间存在结构化和部分冗余特征；存在性能-鲁棒性权衡，集成模型在稳定性和性能上更优。

Abstract: Accurate and reproducible disease risk prediction remains challenging due to heterogeneous features, limited samples, and severe class imbalance. This study introduces yvsoucom-iterkit, a deterministic and log-driven automated machine learning framework that formulates pipeline optimization as a fully reproducible, configuration-level system. Each pipeline is encoded as a traceable log entity, enabling analysis of component attribution, interactions, similarity, and cross-seed robustness. Experiments on the Pima Indians Diabetes and Stroke datasets across more than 18,000 pipeline configurations reveal a structured and partially redundant search space, where performance is governed by a small subset of interacting components. Random Forest importance analysis identifies augmentation (0.454), model choice (0.198), and imbalance handling (0.101) as key drivers on Pima, while imbalance handling dominates Stroke (0.406). Component similarity analysis shows strong redundancy, with feature selection variants (biMax-biMean) exhibiting low RMS distance (0.0252), mixup closely matching no augmentation (0.0279), and TomekLinks aligning with no imbalance handling (0.0325), whereas Gaussian noise shows greater divergence from no augmentation (0.10). The framework achieves strong and stable performance using ensemble models (Weighted-F1 0.89, Macro-F1 0.88 on Pima; Weighted-F1 0.94 on Stroke), while Macro-F1 remains lower on Stroke (0.67) due to class imbalance. Cross-seed analysis reveals a performance-robustness trade-off, with ensembles showing lower variability (0.023-0.026) than SVM. These results indicate that effective AutoML optimization can focus on a reduced set of high-impact components.

</details>


### [324] [DualOptim+: Bridging Shared and Decoupled Optimizer States for Better Machine Unlearning in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21539)
*Xuyang Zhong,Qizhang Li,Yiwen Guo,Chen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DualOptim+是一个面向大语言模型机器遗忘的优化框架，通过基础状态与delta状态分离共享与专有表示，并引入自适应桥接机制，在遗忘与保留目标间实现更好权衡，其8bit量化版本还能降低内存开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大型语言模型的机器遗忘任务中，需要在"遗忘特定数据"与"保留模型原有能力"这两个相互冲突的目标之间取得平衡，现有优化方法在这方面的效果不够理想。

Method: 提出DualOptim+框架，包含：1) 基础状态（base state）捕获遗忘与保留目标的共享表示；2) delta状态保留各目标特有的残差信息；3) 根据遗忘梯度与保留梯度之间的方向冲突，自适应地在共享状态与解耦状态之间进行桥接。此外还提出了DualOptim+ 8bit量化变体。

Result: 在虚构遗忘、真实遗忘、安全对齐和多任务学习等多个任务上，DualOptim+均实现了不同目标之间的更优权衡，且8bit量化版本在降低内存开销的同时不牺牲性能。

Conclusion: DualOptim+是一种有效的机器遗忘优化框架，能够自适应平衡冲突目标，具有良好的性能与实用性。

Abstract: We propose DualOptim+, a novel optimization framework for improving machine unlearning in large language models. It introduces a base state to capture common representations shared by forgetting and retaining objectives and delta states to preserve objective-specific residuals. This architecture allows the optimizer to adaptively bridge shared and decoupled states based on the directional conflict between forgetting and retaining gradients. We further introduce DualOptim+ 8bit, a quantized variant that reduces memory overhead without compromising performance. Extensive experiments across fictitious and real-world unlearning, safety alignment, and multi-task learning tasks demonstrate that DualOptim+ consistently achieves a superior trade-off between different objectives. Codes are available at https://github.com/CityU-MLO/DualOptimPlus.

</details>


### [325] [Discovering Entity-Conditioned Lag Heterogeneity: A Lag-Gated Neural Audit Framework for Panel Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21542)
*Andi Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AC-GATE方法，通过实体条件化滞后期权重分布，直接从时序面板数据中生成可审计的异构滞后期结构，而非事后解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法无法提供直接可审计的实体特定滞后期摘要，需要一种能将有效滞后期作为模型结构化输出的方法。

Method: 提出AC-GATE（自适应条件编码器+尺度不变滞后期门控），利用可观测实体级代理变量条件化历史观测的滞后期权重分布，实现条件化适度分布式滞后。

Result: 在合成数据中能恢复异构滞后期结构，在真实数据中生成非退化、具有外部结构性的有效滞后期。

Conclusion: AC-GATE实现了可审计的实体条件化滞后期发现，在预测校准与滞后期发现的分层审计协议下表现良好。

Abstract: Country-level temporal panels are widely used in empirical analysis. Researchers often need to audit how different entities respond to historical signals over different time horizons. Current approaches typically do not provide directly auditable entity-specific lag summaries. We formulate entity-conditioned heterogeneous lag discovery as a temporal panel mining task and propose AC-GATE, an Adaptive-Conditioning Encoder with a Scale-Invariant Lag Gate. It instantiates conditional Moderated Distributed Lag by using observable entity-level proxies to condition lag-weight distributions over historical observations, thereby making effective lags structural outputs of the model rather than post-hoc explanations. The evaluation is based on a layered audit protocol that separates predictive calibration from lag discovery. A synthetic panel with known ground-truth lags is used for mechanism recovery testing, and two real-world country-level panels are used for external audit and stress testing. The results show that AC-GATE can recover heterogeneous lag structure in synthetic data, and generates non-degenerate, externally structured effective lags in real data.

</details>


### [326] [Provable Joint Decontamination for Benchmarking Multiple Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21543)
*Zhenlong Liu,Hao Zeng,Hongxin Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Joint Envelope Conformal Selection (JECS)，一种联合保形选择方法，用于多模型基准测试去污，在控制全局污染率的同时实现更高的检测效力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准数据污染检测方法要么缺乏理论保证（基于评分的），要么只能针对单模型进行保形控制，导致多模型比较时产生不一致的基准测试结果。

Method: JECS计算每个模型的保形p值，取每个数据点的最大p值聚合，从右尾观测重建最大p零分布的保守包络，再用自适应Benjamini-Hochberg过程选择基准。

Result: 在多种模型和基准测试上的实验表明，JECS在保持目标全局污染率控制的同时，比最大p值基线方法具有更高的统计效力。

Conclusion: JECS成功实现了多模型场景下的联合基准污染检测，提供了可证明的全局污染率控制，为公平的跨模型比较提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Benchmark data contamination has become a central challenge in LLM evaluation: when evaluation examples appear in the training data of one or more audited models, reported performance can be inflated and cross-model comparisons become unreliable. A broad line of training-data detection work designs scores to quantify how strongly a model memorizes a given data point, but these score-based methods lack theoretical guarantees. Recent conformal approaches provide provable false-identification control for a single model; however, applying them separately to each model can produce model-specific benchmarks, undermining fair comparison across models. In this work, we formalize multi-model benchmark decontamination as a joint selection problem and propose Joint Envelope Conformal Selection (JECS), a conformal procedure that enables global contamination rate (GCR) control under stated assumptions.
